rows.original:
Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.
In order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.
rows.translation:
尝试分解非可迭代对象时出现错误。
要使一个对象具备可迭代性，该对象必须拥有 [Symbol.iterator]() 方法。
rows.raw: "Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.\nIn order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method."

rows.original: Getting out the bundle of camping gear, you waste no time in unwrapping it and setting out the equipment within. [party.som|Pitching a decent camp all by yourself takes some time, but at length you get it done|You move to put it all together into something usable, and [companion1.name] moves to help you. Before too long, you've got your camp all secure and ready to go|With the aid of [companion1.name] and [companion2.name], the camp is quickly set up and ready to be used].
rows.translation: 你拿出那一大包露营装备，立刻开始拆开并整理好里面的物品。[party.som|独自搭建一个像样的营地确实需要一些时间，但最终你还是完成了|你开始把这些装备组装成可以使用的状态，而[companion1.name]也过来帮你。没过多久，你的营地就搭建好了，随时可以投入使用|在[companion1.name]和[companion2.name]的帮助下，营地很快就搭建完毕，可以开始使用了]。
rows.raw: "Getting out the bundle of camping gear, you waste no time in unwrapping it and setting out the equipment within. [party.som|Pitching a decent camp all by yourself takes some time, but at length you get it done|You move to put it all together into something usable, and [companion1.name] moves to help you. Before too long, you've got your camp all secure and ready to go|With the aid of [companion1.name] and [companion2.name], the camp is quickly set up and ready to be used].\n\n"

rows.original: This location is a pretty good one — you think that the site you've set up here is safe and secluded. Sure, exposure to the elements will eventually cause your little camp to fall apart, but it'll be a good long while before it does so. With any luck, nothing will come along and tear it down either.
rows.translation: 这个地点确实相当不错——你认为自己在这里搭建的小营地既安全又隐蔽。当然，长时间暴露在自然环境中最终会导致你的营地毁坏，但这个过程还需要相当长的时间。如果运气好的话，应该也不会有别的东西来破坏它。
rows.raw: "This location is a pretty good one — you think that the site you've set up here is safe and secluded. Sure, exposure to the elements will eventually cause your little camp to fall apart, but it'll be a good long while before it does so. With any luck, nothing will come along and tear it down either."

rows.original: The location you've chosen to camp in is a relatively safe one. While you'll still have to be careful about sleeping out in the wild, chances are that nothing's going to disturb you in the night. You ought to be able to come back to this place for some time and expect your little camp to be undisturbed.
rows.translation: 你选择的露营地点相对来说比较安全。虽然在外面露营时仍然需要保持警惕，但一般来说，夜间应该不会有什么东西打扰你。你应该可以经常回到这个地方，而你的小营地也会保持原样，不会受到任何干扰。
rows.raw: "The location you've chosen to camp in is a relatively safe one. While you'll still have to be careful about sleeping out in the wild, chances are that nothing's going to disturb you in the night. You ought to be able to come back to this place for some time and expect your little camp to be undisturbed."

rows.original: This place doesn't look too safe for camping — [party.isJustPC|alone as you are, you'll have to make do with sleeping with one eye open|setting up a watch rotation while you rest is probably a good idea]. Your needs mandate that you camp here, though, and so you go about setting things up. You might be able to return to this camp and use it for a handful of days, but any longer and chances are someone or something else will have come across it.
rows.translation: 这个地方看起来不太适合露营…… [party.isJustPC|既然你孤身一人，那就只能睁一只眼睡觉了。|在你休息的时候安排轮流值班，这个主意应该不错。]不过，由于你的需求，你必须在这里扎营，于是你开始准备各种所需物品。你或许还能回到这个营地，并继续使用它几天，但如果时间拖得太长，很可能会有人或其他东西发现它。
rows.raw: "This place doesn't look too safe for camping — [party.isJustPC|alone as you are, you'll have to make do with sleeping with one eye open|setting up a watch rotation while you rest is probably a good idea]. Your needs mandate that you camp here, though, and so you go about setting things up. You might be able to return to this camp and use it for a handful of days, but any longer and chances are someone or something else will have come across it."

rows.original: You're keenly aware of the fact that resting here is dangerous, but when you have to rest... you have to rest. You'll be lucky to finish a night's sleep unmolested, and there's no way this camp isn't going to be destroyed shortly after you leave.
rows.translation: 你非常清楚在这里休息是危险的，但当真的需要休息的时候……还是得休息。能安安稳稳地睡一整晚已经算是幸运了，而你一离开，这个营地肯定很快就会被毁掉。
rows.raw: "You're keenly aware of the fact that resting here is dangerous, but when you have to rest... you have to rest. You'll be lucky to finish a night's sleep unmolested, and there's no way this camp isn't going to be destroyed shortly after you leave."

rows.original:
[rand
        |You've set up camp in the foothills, finding a sheltered overhang under which you can hide the light of your campfire from the ever-present harpies wheeling in the sky. Long, yellowed grass grows all around within easy reach, the dry material serving just as well as kindling in getting your fire started. Night in the foothills can get rough and chilly, but it's still relatively tame for the Frost Marches; it's only going to get worse the higher you go.
        |You've found a little nook in a nearby cliff face, out of the reach of the howling winds that come running through the chasms and gullies of the foothills. The cubbyhole is relatively small but solid, and a flat-topped rock to one side makes for a makeshift seat or low table depending on one's circumstances. All in all, this makes for a compact, homey campsite that is likely to be safe from harpies, given the feathery cumrags' proclivities.
        |You've taken shelter in the shadow of some ruined fortifications — thrown together from piled stones and wooden palings, whatever battle took place here has wrecked the lot, but a few palisades and dugouts still remain to give your camp some shelter from the elements. You haven't even bothered to dig a firepit, since there's already a nice round depression in the earth a stone's throw away from where you've decided to pitch the tents.
        ]
rows.translation:
[rand
        |你在山脚下搭建了营地，找了一处有遮蔽的岩架，将营火的光芒遮挡起来，免受天空中盘旋的鹰身女妖的窥视。周围长满了黄色的草，这些干草同样可以用来生火。虽然山脚处的夜晚可能会变得寒冷恶劣，但相比霜冻之地来说，这里还算相对安全；不过，越往高处走，情况就会变得越糟。
        |你在附近的悬崖面上找到了一处小角落，那里远离山脚下那些呼啸的风暴。这个小洞虽然不大，但结构坚固，旁边有一块平石头，可以根据需要当作临时座椅或低矮的桌子使用。总的来说，这个营地虽然空间狭小，但却非常舒适，而且考虑到鹰身女妖的习性，这里应该比较安全。
        |你躲在一些废弃的防御工事的阴影下——这些工事是用堆叠的石头和木桩搭建的，无论这里曾经发生过什么战斗，那些痕迹都已经荡然无存了，不过还剩下一些木桩和壕沟，可以为你的营地提供一定的遮蔽。你甚至都没有费心挖一个火坑，因为在距离你搭建帐篷的地方不远处，地面上就已经有一个天然的圆形凹陷，正好可以用作火坑。
        ]
rows.raw:
"
        [rand
        |You've set up camp in the foothills, finding a sheltered overhang under which you can hide the light of your campfire from the ever-present harpies wheeling in the sky. Long, yellowed grass grows all around within easy reach, the dry material serving just as well as kindling in getting your fire started. Night in the foothills can get rough and chilly, but it's still relatively tame for the Frost Marches; it's only going to get worse the higher you go.
        |You've found a little nook in a nearby cliff face, out of the reach of the howling winds that come running through the chasms and gullies of the foothills. The cubbyhole is relatively small but solid, and a flat-topped rock to one side makes for a makeshift seat or low table depending on one's circumstances. All in all, this makes for a compact, homey campsite that is likely to be safe from harpies, given the feathery cumrags' proclivities.
        |You've taken shelter in the shadow of some ruined fortifications — thrown together from piled stones and wooden palings, whatever battle took place here has wrecked the lot, but a few palisades and dugouts still remain to give your camp some shelter from the elements. You haven't even bothered to dig a firepit, since there's already a nice round depression in the earth a stone's throw away from where you've decided to pitch the tents.
        ]
        

"

rows.translation:
[rand
        |你在山脚下搭起了营地，找了一处有遮蔽的岩架，将营火的光芒藏了起来，这样那些总是在天空中盘旋的鹰身女妖就无法看到。周围长满了金黄色的草，这些干草同样可以用来生火。山脚下的夜晚可能会变得寒冷而恶劣，但相比“霜冻之地”来说，这里还算比较温和的；毕竟，你越往高处走，情况就会变得越糟。
        |你在附近的悬崖面上找到了一处隐蔽的小角落，那里远离那些肆虐在山脚峡谷中的狂风。这个小洞虽然面积不大，但结构十分坚固；一侧还有块平坦的岩石，根据需要，可以临时当作座椅或低矮的桌子使用。总的来说，这个地方虽然空间有限，但却非常舒适。考虑到那些长着羽毛的怪物向来喜欢袭击易受攻击的目标，这里应该能够让你免受它们的侵扰。
        |你躲在一些废弃的防御工事的阴影下——这些工事只是用堆叠的石头和木桩临时搭建起来的。无论这里曾经发生过什么战斗，都把这些设施毁得面目全非，但仍然有几道木栅栏和挖好的壕沟能够为你的营地提供一些遮蔽，帮助你抵御自然环境的侵袭。你甚至都没有费心去挖一个火坑，因为在你决定搭建帐篷的地方，不远处地面上就已经有一个天然的圆形凹陷，正好可以用作火堆的位置。
        ]
rows.raw:
"
        [rand
        |You've set up camp in the foothills, finding a sheltered overhang under which you can hide the light of your campfire from the ever-present harpies wheeling in the sky. Long, yellowed grass grows all around within easy reach, the dry material serving just as well as kindling in getting your fire started. Night in the foothills can get rough and chilly, but it's still relatively tame for the Frost Marches; it's only going to get worse the higher you go.
        |You've found a little nook in a nearby cliff face, out of the reach of the howling winds that come running through the chasms and gullies of the foothills. The cubbyhole is relatively small but solid, and a flat-topped rock to one side makes for a makeshift seat or low table depending on one's circumstances. All in all, this makes for a compact, homey campsite that is likely to be safe from harpies, given the feathery cumrags' proclivities.
        |You've taken shelter in the shadow of some ruined fortifications — thrown together from piled stones and wooden palings, whatever battle took place here has wrecked the lot, but a few palisades and dugouts still remain to give your camp some shelter from the elements. You haven't even bothered to dig a firepit, since there's already a nice round depression in the earth a stone's throw away from where you've decided to pitch the tents.
        ]
        \n\n"

rows.original: [rand |You've chosen this little glade in which to set up camp, the Old Forest parting a little to give you just enough space to put down your camping gear. While the trees might be a little too close for comfort, the ground is soft with leaf litter and fresh grass, and trying to find a spot off the trail that isn't covered by roots, rocks or rot is like trying to find a needle in a haystack. Best to make do with what you have. |This small clearing has presented itself as a pretty good spot to make camp. Small wildflowers and the occasional puffball grow amidst a short carpet of grass, and a nearby fallen log makes for a good place to rest your tired feet. With you situated in the middle of everything, anyone approaching your camp would have to step into the open long before they could get close. |You've set up camp in some pale elf ruins, making use of the overgrown walls and crumbling pillars to shield you and your campfire from sight. The mossy marble flagstones of this raised square may be hard on the back, but at least you won't be waking to a waterlogged ground sheet if it rains. [party.has etheryn|Etheryn looks at the ruins around her and sighs sadly. "The pale elves used to be so much more... then the Godswar happened. That, along with the schism between the official worship of the Seven and the druids who still followed the Old Wyld, ended us as a major power in the Frost Marches. Now someone else will rise to fill the void left by our waning." [pc.isDK|Tough luck. All good things must come to an end, such is the way of the world — and the pale elves' time is over.|You move to comfort Etheryn, but she shakes her head and wordlessly steps away. She probably needs a minute or two of alone time.]] ]
rows.translation: [rand |你选择了这片小树林作为露营地点，老森林的部分地带稍微分开，为你提供了足够的空间来摆放露营装备。虽然树木的距离可能有点太近，不太舒适，但地面被落叶和新鲜的草覆盖着，十分柔软。要想在远离小路的地方找到一个既没有树根、石头也没有腐烂物的地方，简直就像在干草堆里找一根针一样困难。所以，还是接受现状吧。 |这个小小的空地简直是个搭建营地的绝佳地点。短矮的草丛中点缀着野花，偶尔还能看到一些马勃菌；附近有一根倒下的原木，可以用来休息疲惫的双脚。当你站在这个空地的中央时，任何想要接近你的营地的人，都必须在进入开阔地带之前先走过一段距离。 |你在一些苍白精灵的废墟中搭建了营地，利用那些杂草丛生的墙壁和摇摇欲坠的柱子来遮挡自己和小火堆，以免被人发现。虽然这些长满苔藓的大理石铺路石会让你的背部感到不适，但至少下雨的时候，你不会醒来时发现自己的睡垫被水浸透了。 [party.has etheryn|埃瑟琳望着周围的废墟，悲伤地叹了口气。 那些苍白精灵曾经如此强大……直到神战爆发。那场战争，再加上对七神官方崇拜与那些依然遵循古老自然法则的德鲁伊之间的分裂，使我们彻底失去了在霜冻边境地区作为强大力量的地位。现在，必定会有其他势力崛起，来填补我们衰落后留下的空缺。 [pc.isDK|运气不好吧。所有美好的事物终究都会走到尽头，这就是世界的规律——而苍白精灵的时代也已经结束了。|你试图去安慰艾瑟琳，但她只是摇了摇头，然后默默地走开了。她可能需要一两分钟的时间来独处。]] ]

rows.original:
[rand|
        You've set up camp in one of the endless rolling fields of knee-high grass, trusting in it to shield you from prying eyes. It's been tough flattening enough grass to get enough ground on which to pitch your tents, but the wide expanse should at least give you plenty of advance warning of anyone or anything approaching your camp.
        
        With the grass as dry as tinder and liable to burst into flame, you've elected to dig the firepit deep and keep the fire small. Plenty of fuel all around you — last thing you want to wake up to is a prairie fire.
        
        The ever-present winds that spill off the mountains to the west set the grasses to rustling, creating a not-unpleasant white noise that strangely makes one drowsy... 
        |
        You've taken cover in a stand of scraggly trees, getting what relief you can from the constant winds that sweep across the green, rolling expanse of Harvest Valley. While it's a little more cramped than one would otherwise like, it's a relief to not have to deal with wind chill for once. Even the fire has lit easily with a little cover, providing much needed warmth — like nights in the Jassiran desert, the starry, cloudless sky means nights can be cold.
        |
        You've set up camp in the shadow of a small mound, the wind facing away from you. Even though the elevation isn't very high, the short walk to its peak affords one a good vantage point from which to survey one's surroundings. With how flat the grassland is, you'll be able to see any marauders long before they're upon you.
        
        The [dayNight|sun hangs high in the cloudless sky, beating fiercely down upon the valley. It's not so much the heat, ameliorated by the winds, but the sensation of them beating down upon you that makes you wish for shade. Little wonder centaurs and marefolk alike have kept to the mountainous and sheltered west and south|moon shines down upon the valley, bathing it in pearlescent luminescence. Here and now, it actually looks like the grasses themselves are glowing... beautiful, perhaps, but eerie at the same time].
        ]
rows.translation:
[rand|
        你在一片一望无际、长满及膝高度草丛的田野中搭起了帐篷，相信这些草丛能够保护你免受旁人窥视。虽然要平整出足够的地面来搭建帐篷确实费了一番功夫，但这片广阔的区域至少能让你及时发现任何接近你营地的人或物。
        
        当干草已经干得像火绒一样，随时可能燃烧起来时，你选择把火坑挖得深一些，让火势保持微弱。周围到处都有燃料——你最不希望看到的，就是一场草原大火。
        
        从西边的山脉吹来的持续不断的风，使草丛发出沙沙声，这种并不刺耳的白色噪音会让人产生一种奇怪的困倦感…… 
        |
        你躲在一片杂乱的小树丛中，试图躲避那些不断吹过丰收谷那片广阔而翠绿的地域的强风。虽然这样的躲藏方式有些拥挤，但至少可以不用再忍受寒风的侵袭了。有了这些树木的遮挡，火堆也很容易被点燃，带来了急需的温暖——就像在贾西兰沙漠里一样，那里星空璀璨、万里无云，夜晚也会变得非常寒冷。
        |
        你在一个小土堆的阴影下搭起了帐篷，让风从你的背后吹来。虽然这个土堆的高度并不高，但只需走一小段路就能到达它的顶端，从那里你可以清楚地观察到周围的环境。由于这片草原非常平坦，你一定能早在那些入侵者靠近之前就发现他们的踪迹。 [dayNight|阳光毫无云彩的遮挡，高高悬挂在天空之中，猛烈地照射在山谷之上。其实并不是那股被风声缓解的热量本身让人感到不适，而是那种被热浪无情侵袭的感觉，才让人真正渴望得到阴凉。难怪半人马和人鱼们都选择居住在那些地势险要、避风遮雨的西部和南部地区。|月光洒在山谷上，使整个山谷呈现出珍珠般的光泽。此刻，看起来仿佛是那些草本身在发光……这般景象固然美丽，但同时也带有一种诡异的氛围。].
        ]
rows.raw:
"
        [rand|
        You've set up camp in one of the endless rolling fields of knee-high grass, trusting in it to shield you from prying eyes. It's been tough flattening enough grass to get enough ground on which to pitch your tents, but the wide expanse should at least give you plenty of advance warning of anyone or anything approaching your camp.
        
        With the grass as dry as tinder and liable to burst into flame, you've elected to dig the firepit deep and keep the fire small. Plenty of fuel all around you — last thing you want to wake up to is a prairie fire.
        
        The ever-present winds that spill off the mountains to the west set the grasses to rustling, creating a not-unpleasant white noise that strangely makes one drowsy... 
        |
        You've taken cover in a stand of scraggly trees, getting what relief you can from the constant winds that sweep across the green, rolling expanse of Harvest Valley. While it's a little more cramped than one would otherwise like, it's a relief to not have to deal with wind chill for once. Even the fire has lit easily with a little cover, providing much needed warmth — like nights in the Jassiran desert, the starry, cloudless sky means nights can be cold.
        |
        You've set up camp in the shadow of a small mound, the wind facing away from you. Even though the elevation isn't very high, the short walk to its peak affords one a good vantage point from which to survey one's surroundings. With how flat the grassland is, you'll be able to see any marauders long before they're upon you.
        
        The [dayNight|sun hangs high in the cloudless sky, beating fiercely down upon the valley. It's not so much the heat, ameliorated by the winds, but the sensation of them beating down upon you that makes you wish for shade. Little wonder centaurs and marefolk alike have kept to the mountainous and sheltered west and south|moon shines down upon the valley, bathing it in pearlescent luminescence. Here and now, it actually looks like the grasses themselves are glowing... beautiful, perhaps, but eerie at the same time].
        ]
        

"

rows.original: You've set up camp in the middle of several large pines, their imposing trunks offering some measure of protection and concealment for your little campsite. It may not be enough given the relative wildness of the Frostwood, but it's what you're going to get, and the scent of pine needles pervades the air.
rows.translation: 你在几棵高大的松树中间搭建了营地，这些松树粗壮的树干为你的小营地提供了一定的保护与遮蔽。不过考虑到弗罗斯特伍德的荒野环境，这样的防护措施可能还不够，但这也是你目前能做到的最好的选择了。空气中弥漫着松针的清香。

        You've set up camp in the middle of several large pines, their imposing trunks offering some measure of protection and concealment for your little campsite. "

rows.translation:
你在几棵高大的松树中间搭建了营地，这些松树粗壮的树干为你的小营地提供了一定的保护与遮蔽。不过考虑到弗罗斯特伍德的荒野环境，这样的防护措施可能还不够，但这也是你目前能做到的最好的选择了。空气中弥漫着松针的清香。
        \n\n
rows.raw: "\n        You've set up camp in the middle of several large pines, their imposing trunks offering some measure of protection and concealment for your little campsite. It may not be enough given the relative wildness of the Frostwood, but it's what you're going to get, and the scent of pine needles pervades the air.\n        \\n\\n"

rows.original: [rand |You've hollowed out a portion of a solid-looking snowdrift, creating an overhang of compacted snow under which you can pitch your tents and get some respite from the wind. With the expense of the glacial rift largely flat between the two mountain ranges to the east and west, landward winds coming in from the ocean are able to pick up mighty speeds, making the cold even worse than it already is and practically requiring some kind of additional shelter to prevent your tents from being blown away. [dayNight |Despite the sun beating down on you, there's little respite from the cold |The night sky with its stars and aurora may be pretty, but they're little distraction from the cold, even more bitter now that the sun has set ]. You've heard that snow is good at keeping in heat, but this little hollow is probably far too open to take advantage of that to begin with. |You've found a small crevasse in the ice to pitch camp in, a gentle ramp leading downwards beneath ground level and to the bottom. The walls are high enough to keep out the wind and hide you from sight, a fact that you're eminently grateful for as the calls of several large birds come to you from the distance. It's a little unsettling having the walls of ruddy blue ice all about you — you can't shake the feeling that they might decide to collapse in upon you at any moment — but suitable campsites in this desolate land of cold are few and far between. The ice here has been surprisingly yielding, giving way easily when you drove in the pegs for your tents. Considering that they've frozen about the spikes, pulling them up when it's time to strike camp may be a bit of a bother... |You've found refuge of a sort amidst a thicket of crystal roses, bushes upon bushes of the thorny, icy-stemmed plants crawling out over the frozen ground and ice. Working your way to the heart of the thicket and finding a suitable spot to pitch camp has taken a bit of time, but at least the thorns will dissuade most local denizens from bothering you while you're resting. Anything trying to ambush your camp while you're resting is going to have a terrible time getting through all this unscathed in the darkness. That, and so long as one doesn't actually touch them, they're actually pretty beautiful to look at. With everything that's been going on in the world since you set off on this quest, it's nice to have a little wild beauty to appreciate every now and then. |You've found a little cubbyhole in a rock outcropping to take your respite in, out of the wind, cold and snow. Close to the mountains, these are more numerous, but glacial activity over the ages has resulted in spires of tougher rock every now and then jutting out of the ground, some even out of the sea ice — they must extend all the way to the ocean floor. Sheltered as it is, the ground is hard and frozen solid; pitching your tents was hard enough — instead of trying to break cold rock, you've piled up several medium-sized rocks about your tent pegs, hoping those will hold. The hard ground is already enough to make your back unsure about the prospect of sleeping on it, even through a ground sheet... well, there's a reason all of this is called roughing it, isn't that the case? ]
rows.translation: [rand |你在一处看似坚固的雪堆中挖出了一个空洞，形成了一个由压实的雪构成的遮蔽处，可以在那里搭帐篷，暂时躲避寒风。由于东西两侧的山脉之间有一条几乎平坦的冰川裂隙，从海洋吹来的陆风会加速流动，使得寒冷变得更加剧烈，因此如果没有额外的庇护措施，帐篷很容易被风吹走。 [dayNight |尽管阳光炙热地照耀着你，但寒冷依然无法缓解。 |夜空中的星星和极光虽然很美，但它们并不能帮助你抵御寒冷，尤其是当太阳落山之后，寒冷变得更加刺骨了。 ]你听说过雪具有保温作用，但这个小小的空洞实在太过开放，根本无法利用这一特性来保暖。 |你在冰层中发现了一个小裂缝，可以在那里搭帐篷。裂缝下方有一个缓缓倾斜的通道，通向地面以下。这些高高的冰壁足以阻挡寒风，让你免受视线范围内的干扰。这时，远处传来几只大型鸟的叫声，你不禁感到有些不安——周围这些红蓝色的冰壁仿佛随时都有可能坍塌下来……不过，在这片寒冷而荒凉的土地上，合适的露营地本来就很少见。 这里的冰层出奇地柔软，当你插入帐篷的桩子时，冰层很容易就被压塌了。考虑到这些桩子已经冻结在冰层中，等到需要撤营时拔出来可能会相当麻烦…… |你在一片由水晶玫瑰组成的灌木丛中找到了避难所。这些带刺的、茎干覆盖着冰的植物在冰冻的地面上蔓延开来。你费了些功夫才找到一个合适的地点搭帐篷，不过这些刺至少可以阻止大多数当地的生物来打扰你休息。在黑暗中，任何想要偷袭你的营地的东西都会遇到很大的困难…… 没错，只要不去触碰它们，这些植物看起来确实非常美丽。自从你开始这次冒险以来，世界上发生了太多事情，偶尔能欣赏到这样的自然美景，确实让人感到欣慰。 |你在一块岩石突出处找到了一个小洞穴，可以在那里躲避寒风、寒冷和积雪。靠近山脉的地方，这样的洞穴比较多，但经过长时间的冰川作用，偶尔也会有一些更加坚硬的岩石从地面或海冰中突出来——它们肯定一直延伸到海底吧。 虽然这个地方有遮蔽作用，但地面却非常坚硬且完全冻结了。搭帐篷已经够麻烦的了——你没有试图敲碎那些冰块，而是在这些帐篷桩子的周围堆了一些中等大小的石头，希望它们能够起到支撑作用。这么坚硬的地面，即使铺上了地席，睡觉也会让人感到非常不舒服……嗯，这就是所谓的“艰苦生存”，不是吗？ ]

rows.translation: [rand |你在一处看似坚固的雪堆中挖出了一个空洞，形成了一个由压实的雪覆盖的悬垂结构，可以在下面搭帐篷，从而躲避风的侵袭。由于东西两侧的山脉之间的冰川裂隙几乎平坦，从海洋吹来的陆风会加速流动，使得寒冷变得更加剧烈，因此几乎必须采取额外的防护措施，才能防止帐篷被风吹走。 [dayNight |尽管阳光炙热地照耀着你，但寒冷依然无法缓解 |夜空中的星星和极光或许很美，但它们并不能帮助你抵御寒冷，尤其是当太阳落山之后，寒冷变得更加刺骨 ]. 你听说过雪具有保温作用，但这个小小的空洞显然太开放了，根本无法利用这一特性来保暖。 |你在冰层中找到了一条狭窄的裂缝作为营地，一条平缓的斜坡向下延伸，最终通向地面以下。这些冰壁足够高，可以阻挡风声，同时也能隐藏你的存在。当你听到远处有几只大型鸟儿的叫声时，你对此感到十分庆幸。被这些赤褐色的冰壁包围着，确实会让人感到有些不安——你总担心它们随时可能会坍塌下来……但在这片寒冷而荒凉的土地上，合适的营地实在是少之又少。 这里的冰层出奇地柔软，当你插入帐篷的桩子时，冰层很容易就被压陷。考虑到这些桩子已经冻结在冰层中，等到需要撤营时拔出来，可能会相当麻烦…… |你在一片由水晶玫瑰组成的灌木丛中找到了避难所。这些带刺的、茎干覆盖着冰的植物在冰冻的地面上蔓延生长。你费了些功夫才找到一片合适的地点搭帐篷，不过这些刺至少可以阻止大多数当地的动物来打扰你休息。任何想要在你在休息时袭击你的生物，都会在黑暗中艰难地穿过这些灌木丛。 而且，只要不去触碰它们，这些植物看起来其实还挺漂亮的。自从你开始这次冒险以来，世界上发生了太多事情，偶尔能欣赏到这样的自然美景，确实让人感到欣慰。 |你在一块岩石突出部分找到了一个小洞穴，可以躲在里面避风、避寒、避开积雪。靠近山脉的地方，这样的洞穴比较多，但经过长时间的冰川作用，偶尔也会有一些更加坚硬的岩石从地面或海冰中突出来——它们肯定一直延伸到海底。 虽然这个洞穴提供了庇护，但地面却非常坚硬且完全冻结了。搭帐篷已经够麻烦的了——你没有试图敲碎那些坚硬的岩石，而是在这些帐篷桩子的周围堆了一些中等大小的石头，希望它们能够起到支撑作用。这么坚硬的地面，即使铺上了地席，睡觉也会让人感到非常不舒服……嗯，这就是所谓的“艰苦生存”，不是吗？ ] \n\n
rows.raw: " [rand |You've hollowed out a portion of a solid-looking snowdrift, creating an overhang of compacted snow under which you can pitch your tents and get some respite from the wind. With the expense of the glacial rift largely flat between the two mountain ranges to the east and west, landward winds coming in from the ocean are able to pick up mighty speeds, making the cold even worse than it already is and practically requiring some kind of additional shelter to prevent your tents from being blown away. [dayNight |Despite the sun beating down on you, there's little respite from the cold |The night sky with its stars and aurora may be pretty, but they're little distraction from the cold, even more bitter now that the sun has set ]. You've heard that snow is good at keeping in heat, but this little hollow is probably far too open to take advantage of that to begin with. |You've found a small crevasse in the ice to pitch camp in, a gentle ramp leading downwards beneath ground level and to the bottom. The walls are high enough to keep out the wind and hide you from sight, a fact that you're eminently grateful for as the calls of several large birds come to you from the distance. It's a little unsettling having the walls of ruddy blue ice all about you — you can't shake the feeling that they might decide to collapse in upon you at any moment — but suitable campsites in this desolate land of cold are few and far between. The ice here has been surprisingly yielding, giving way easily when you drove in the pegs for your tents. Considering that they've frozen about the spikes, pulling them up when it's time to strike camp may be a bit of a bother... |You've found refuge of a sort amidst a thicket of crystal roses, bushes upon bushes of the thorny, icy-stemmed plants crawling out over the frozen ground and ice. Working your way to the heart of the thicket and finding a suitable spot to pitch camp has taken a bit of time, but at least the thorns will dissuade most local denizens from bothering you while you're resting. Anything trying to ambush your camp while you're resting is going to have a terrible time getting through all this unscathed in the darkness. That, and so long as one doesn't actually touch them, they're actually pretty beautiful to look at. With everything that's been going on in the world since you set off on this quest, it's nice to have a little wild beauty to appreciate every now and then. |You've found a little cubbyhole in a rock outcropping to take your respite in, out of the wind, cold and snow. Close to the mountains, these are more numerous, but glacial activity over the ages has resulted in spires of tougher rock every now and then jutting out of the ground, some even out of the sea ice — they must extend all the way to the ocean floor. Sheltered as it is, the ground is hard and frozen solid; pitching your tents was hard enough — instead of trying to break cold rock, you've piled up several medium-sized rocks about your tent pegs, hoping those will hold. The hard ground is already enough to make your back unsure about the prospect of sleeping on it, even through a ground sheet... well, there's a reason all of this is called roughing it, isn't that the case? ] \n\n"

rows.original: You've found a recess in the side of the tunnel to pitch your tents in, sinking the pegs into loose gravel. It's far enough off the beaten path that you're relatively hidden, but close enough that you can see anyone approaching at a distance. You reckon that it won't be more than half a day before even this impromptu camp is discovered, but it doesn't need to last long, simply long enough.
rows.translation: 你在隧道的一侧发现了一个凹陷处，可以在那里搭帐篷，把帐篷桩插进松软的碎石里。这个地方离人迹罕至的地方相当远，因此你们相对比较隐蔽，但距离又足够近，可以及时发现任何靠近的人。你估计，这个临时搭建的营地最多半天的时间就会被发现，不过其实并不需要持续太久，只要足够让你们完成计划就行了。

You reckon that it won't be more than half a day before even this impromptu camp is discovered, but it doesn't need to last long, simply long enough.
        

"

rows.original:
You've found a hollow at the foot of one of the peaks' many sheer cliffs, deep enough to keep out of the wind, not deep enough to contain any nasty surprises. The clean smell of cold frost permeates a little way into the cubbyhole and sharp pebbles litter the hard floor, but it's a small price to pay for somewhere safe and out of the wind to hole up in to rest.

        You can't actually pitch tents here, but at least it's possible to stretch the canvas and ropes between the stones to create a reasonable approximation that'll hold against the constant draft. It's not perfect, but it's as comfortable as things will get here outside of a harpy nest.
rows.translation:
你在其中一座山峰陡峭的悬崖脚下发现了一个凹陷处，那里足够深，可以避开寒风，但又不至于深到会隐藏什么危险的东西。清新的霜冻气息弥漫在这个小角落里，坚硬的地面上散布着尖锐的鹅卵石，但为了找到一个安全且避风的地方休息，这些小麻烦都算不了什么。

虽然在这里实际上无法搭帐篷，但至少可以把帆布和绳子固定在岩石之间，搭建出一个勉强能抵御持续寒风的简易庇护所。虽然不够完美，但在这个地方，除了女妖的巢穴之外，这已经算是最舒适的了。

"

rows.translation: 与自己发生违背自然的关系。

rows.original: Brienne mentioned you'd get another present tonight. Wonder what that could be?
rows.translation: 布蕾妮说过，你今晚还会收到另一份礼物。不知道会是什么呢？
rows.raw: "Brienne mentioned you'd get another present tonight. Wonder what that could be?"

rows.original: Brint mentioned you'd get the rest of your present tonight. What ever could he possibly have meant?
rows.translation: 布林特说过你今晚会收到剩下的礼物。他到底是什么意思呢？
rows.raw: "Brint mentioned you'd get the rest of your present tonight. What ever could he possibly have meant?"

rows.original: You've got a bit of time to spare before you need to turn in. Spending some time [party.som|by yourself in quiet contemplation|with [companion1.name]|with [companion1.name] and [companion2.name]] might help take your mind off troubling thoughts. Alternatively, your tent is set up on the north side of the camp, you could just head off to bed and try to get as much sleep as possible.
rows.translation: 在你需要提交之前，你还有些时间可以利用。花些时间做点别的事情吧。 [party.som|独自沉浸在沉思之中|与……一起 [companion1.name]|与……一起 [companion1.name] 以及 [companion2.name]] 这或许有助于让你暂时忘掉那些烦人的念头。或者，既然你的帐篷已经搭在营地的北侧，你也可以直接去睡觉，尽量多休息一些。
rows.raw: "\n    You've got a bit of time to spare before you need to turn in. Spending some time [party.som|by yourself in quiet contemplation|with [companion1.name]|with [companion1.name] and [companion2.name]] might help take your mind off troubling thoughts. Alternatively, your tent is set up on the north side of the camp, you could just head off to bed and try to get as much sleep as possible."

rows.original: Your tent is a relatively cozy little thing, made of heavy cloth and canvas to keep out the weather and unwanted eyes. You've brought a thick bedroll and blanket to keep the Marches' evening chill away. There's enough room inside for two to sleep comfortably, were you so inclined to invite someone in.
rows.translation: 你的帐篷相当舒适，由厚实的布料和帆布制成，既能阻挡恶劣天气，也能防止旁人窥视。你还带了厚实的睡袋和毯子，以抵御三月夜晚的寒意。帐篷内部空间足够大，两个人可以舒适地躺下睡觉——当然，如果你愿意邀请别人的话……
rows.raw: "\n        Your tent is a relatively cozy little thing, made of heavy cloth and canvas to keep out the weather and unwanted eyes. You've brought a thick bedroll and blanket to keep the Marches' evening chill away. There's enough room inside for two to sleep comfortably, were you so inclined to invite someone in."

rows.translation: 决定谁会与你同床共枕吧。

rows.original: You decide to retire to your tent without further ado. Tomorrow's going to be a long day, and you need all the energy you can get. The bedroll is hard but serviceable, and it's not long before you've nodded off...
rows.translation: 你决定不再拖延，直接回到自己的帐篷里休息。明天将会是漫长的一天，你需要保留所有的精力。睡袋虽然有些硬，但还算可以使用，没过多久你就睡着了……
rows.raw: "\n        You decide to retire to your tent without further ado. Tomorrow's going to be a long day, and you need all the energy you can get. The bedroll is hard but serviceable, and it's not long before you've nodded off..."

The wind howls outside, raging futilely against the thick wooden shutters of the Frost Hound. Several creaks and groans arise from the building's timbers, but you're sure enough in Garth's handiwork that the building is in no danger of collapse. Whatever's out there is probably having a bad time, but here and now, safe and snug in your armchair with a roaring fire and bearskin rug stretched out before you, life is good.

    That, of course, and your pet Cait. Your feline companion has taken as well to the raging blizzard as you have, and has decided to curl up on the rug just in front of the fire; the flickering light dances on her supple, pale skin as she tries to make herself comfortable. rows.original: Roaring fire, hot dinner, cold drinks, and convivial company: you couldn’t ask for much more than an evening at the Frost Hound. After a long day of hiking, fighting, and adventure, it’s always heavenly to take off your pack, put up your feet, and unwind by the fire before a good night’s rest. You smile as you sip your drink, another of Gwyn’s tasty meals in your belly, content to sit back and people-watch for a while. A few burly loggers gesture with their hands and their mugs off to the side, one of them clearly in the midst of a "no shit, there I was" story. A few tables away, humans and lupines crowd around a young wolf-girl and a beardless human, chanting as the pair struggle through the last few rounds of a drinking contest. And at the bar, Garth is good-naturedly chuckling at a flustered human’s awkward attempts to seduce a dove-winged, dark-skinned male wyld elf. Ah, the Frost Hound: an island of good cheer and normal life in the midst of all this mess you’ve landed in. Cold rushes in unexpectedly as the door swings open, but the new arrival closes it again quickly. It’s Cait, slightly shivering, with a messenger bag over her shoulder. She waves to you, then comes over, picking her way between the tables with considerable care. Her right hand stays firmly on the messenger bag, protecting it from jostling or damage, and when she pulls up a stool next to the fire she makes sure to sit with her right side away from the heat. "Mmm," she sighs happily, half-closing her baby blue eyes. "That feels good." No kidding. It’s pretty frigid out there. "Nothing like being back home in Jassira, lover, that’s for sure!" So, what’s in the bag? "Oh, this?" she teases. "These are my hair dyes! My last kit got ruined when the cultists attacked our wagon, and it’s taken until now for Ivris to be able to find all the ingredients and mix me up a fresh batch." She opens the top of the bag, and shows you a nearly endless array of colorful potions, with every color in the spectrum represented in bewildering and minute variations: a green and an emerald and a celadon and a chartreuse, a crimson and an auburn and a scarlet and a vermilion...and, of course, pink. You’d never realized before that she had more than just the one dye, but you suppose it makes sense. "Some of these colors are really hard to get in the Frost Marches, and she went to the trouble anyway! She’s such a sweetie, isn’t she?" That she is. "They’re surprisingly kind of volatile, though, especially when they’re freshly brewed, so I’d better get these to my room right away!" Cait stands to leave, still talking to you, with her hand firmly on the bag. "I’ll be back down in a min-aaaaaah!" You see Cait’s eyes widen as her foot unexpectedly makes contact with your pack on the floor, causing her to stumble. Her hands and tail instinctively flail as she works to keep her balance — successfully, just like any self-respecting catgirl — but as she lets go of the bag, it keeps swinging, and out of the open top fly potions of every shade and persuasion. The rainbow of stoppered flasks hangs in the air for a long moment, each catching a glint off the fire, and then as they rain down onto the Frost Hound’s tables and floor they shatter, releasing huge clouds of colorful smoke that twist and billow, filling the whole room with roiling tempests of orange and blue and purple that merge and blend until everything and everyone is obscured in thick, impenetrable, undifferentiated white. Cait’s the first person you see when the smoke dissipates, coughing from the smoke and clutching an empty bag with a look of abject horror all over her face. Somehow, she’s been hit by a dye too, and where her hair had once been blonde with pink highlights, she’s now a totally pink-haired kitty. "Oh...oh my..." she murmurs weakly. Now divested of her meddlesome clothes, the red-haired Cait saunters over, rubbing her hands together gleefully. "You deserve special attention, [pc.name]." "Oh, does [pc.heShe]," husks your similarly-nude pink Cait as she removes your [pc.armor]. [pc.hasRealCock |She coos at your [pc.cock], gently rubbing her nose up and down it to get a full draft of your heady musk, then slowly runs her tongue down the side, leaving a long, wet trail down your increasingly turgid member that makes you suck in your breath. |She licks her lips at the sight of your moistening [pc.vag], but doesn’t quite dive in just yet — instead, she kisses it, while gently teasing the skin above it with her fingers, bringing a priestess’s touch to your most sensitive areas. ] But just as Pink Cait is about to go to town on you, Red Cait blocks your view as she straddles your [pc.chest]. "Nnn, [pc.hasRealCock |stud |angel ], let me test out your tongue..." Your only response — the only one she needs — is to open wide and reach for her [cait.ass], and she lovingly accepts your eager worship. With your face buried between her divine thighs and waves of pleasure beginning to emanate from your [pc.crotch], you offer a prayer in thanks to immortal Mallach for your new kaleidoscopic kitty harem...
rows.translation: 熊熊燃烧的火焰、热腾腾的晚餐、冰凉的饮料，还有愉快的陪伴：在 Frost Hound 度过的这样一个夜晚，简直再完美不过了。经过一整天的徒步、战斗和冒险，卸下背包、坐在火堆旁放松身心，然后进入美好的梦乡，真的是再幸福不过的事情了。 你一边微笑着小口喝着饮料，一边想着格温做的那些美味佳肴正在自己肚子里消化，心情惬意地坐下来，欣赏着周围人们的种种表现。几个体格魁梧的伐木工用手势示意大家把杯子放到一边，其中一个人显然正在讲述一个“哎呀，我刚才还真在那儿呢”之类的故事。 几张桌子之外，人类和狼人围在一起，观看一位年轻的狼族女孩和一位没有胡须的人类正在进行最后的几轮饮酒比赛。而在酒吧里，加思正开心地笑着，看着那个慌乱的人类笨拙地试图吸引一位拥有鸽子翅膀、皮肤黝黑的野精灵男子。 啊，霜冻猎犬岛——在你们陷入的这一切混乱之中，这里却是充满欢乐与正常生活的岛屿。 门突然打开，寒气骤然涌入，但新来的人迅速又将门关上了。那是凯特，她微微发抖，肩上背着一个 messenger bag。 她向你招手，然后小心翼翼地穿过那些桌子走了过来。她的右手始终紧紧握着那个 messenger bag，防止它被碰撞或损坏。当她拉来一张凳子坐在火堆旁边时，也特意让身体的右侧远离热源。 嗯，”她开心地叹了口气，半闭着那双天蓝色的眼睛，“这种感觉真好。” 说真的，外面可冷极了。 “没有什么比回到贾西拉的家更舒服的了，亲爱的，这一点毫无疑问！” 那么，袋子里到底装了什么呢？ 哦，这个吗？”她调皮地问道，“这些都是我的染发剂！上次那些邪教徒袭击我们的马车时，我的所有染发剂都被毁了，直到现在，伊夫里斯才好不容易找到所有的原料，为我重新配制了一批。”她打开袋子的顶部，向你展示了一排几乎无穷无尽的彩色药水——光谱中的每一种颜色都有无数细微的差别：绿色、翡翠色、青瓷色、黄绿色、深红色、栗色、猩红色、朱红色……当然，还有粉色。你之前根本没意识到她拥有的染料其实不止一种，不过现在想来，这也挺合理的。“在霜冻之地，有些颜料确实很难搞到，但她还是费了这么大劲去弄来了！ 她真是个可爱的人，不是吗？ 确实如此。 “不过，这些咖啡的稳定性其实相当差，尤其是刚煮好的时候，所以我最好马上把它们拿到我的房间去！”凯特边说边站起身，手紧紧地抓着那个袋子，准备离开。“我马上就回来……啊！！！你看到，当凯特的脚意外地碰到了地上你的背包时，她的眼睛立刻睁得大大的，结果她被绊了一下。她的双手和尾巴不自觉地挥动起来，试图保持平衡——就像任何一个有自尊心的猫女一样，她最终还是成功稳住了身体。但是，当她松开背包时，背包开始摇晃起来，从敞开的袋口里飞出了各种各样颜色、形状的药剂。 那些被塞住瓶口的彩色玻璃瓶在空气中悬停了许久，每一颗都在火光中闪烁着光芒。当它们纷纷坠落到霜冻猎犬的桌子和地板上时，全都碎裂了，释放出巨大的彩色烟雾。这些烟雾翻腾着、涌动着，将整个房间充满了橙色、蓝色和紫色的狂暴气息。这些色彩不断交织、融合，最终使得一切事物和人都被一片浓密、浑浊、无法区分的白色所笼罩。 当烟雾散去后，第一个出现在你眼前的是凯特——她正咳嗽着，手里紧握着一个空袋子，脸上写满极度的恐惧。不知怎么的，她也被这种染料影响了：她曾经金发中带有粉色挑染，现在却变成了一头纯粉色的头发。 哦……哦，我的天……”她虚弱地喃喃道。 然后，透过逐渐稀薄的雾气，你可以看到有二十多对猫的眼睛睁开了。 [var0] 曾经，精灵、人类、狼人以及地精们在这里聚在一起饮酒进食，而现在，这里却站着一支由凯特们组成的队伍。她们全都穿着白色的神庙祭司服装，每一双眼睛都闪烁着如同小猫般的蓝光。唯一的区别，就是她们的头发……[cait.isLeothran| 还有毛皮|]这里有一只钴蓝色的凯特，那里有一只翠绿色的凯特，还有一只金黄色的凯特、一只赤褐色的凯特，以及一只棕黄色的凯特。每一只新出现的猫女都有着不同颜色的毛发。 门口有一只拥有西瓜绿和红色头发的凯特，正开心地咯咯笑着：“哦，马拉克，快看看我们大家吧！” “嗯……”一位铂金发色的猫女一边玩弄着自己的毛发，一边低声说道。 [cait.breasts]一个拥有绚丽紫色头发的凯特摇动着她的头发…… [cait.hips]现在这里可有相当于两座寺庙那么多女祭司了呢！” “呃……”红发的凯特咬着嘴唇，闭上眼睛，想到这里不禁叹了口气。她闲闲地摆弄着自己的苋菜色尾巴，说道：“我觉得我们应该做女祭司最擅长的事情……” 粉发凯特张大嘴巴，环顾房间，看着那些颜色各异、形态各异的复制品，最终她突然闭上了嘴…… 咔嗒声然后她转向你，调皮地笑着说道：“你觉得这样听起来怎么样？ [pc.name]你想和我们一起进行祈祷吗？” 哦，天啊，我当然想。 听到这句话，整个房间的人都欢呼起来。那些女性们互相拥抱着，她们的手指和舌头急切地探索着彼此的身体。女祭司们的长袍被随意地扔到地上，毫无用处地堆在那一片混乱之中，因为那些女性们已经占据了整张桌子，开始进行她们热切的祈祷仪式。 它们咯咯笑着，发出呼噜声，还发出轻哼声——每一只都不仅拥有能够带来解脱的神圣能力，还对伴侣们最深层的渴望有着别人无法企及的深刻了解。它们的尾巴各自拥有不同的鲜艳色彩，随着它们身体的扭动和缠绕，让彼此更加紧密地相拥，共同体验那种令人兴奋的愉悦感。 整个房间仿佛变成了一道绚丽的彩虹，其中充满了那种湿漉漉的、令人陶醉的声音——那些象征着猫女们获得极致愉悦的声音。 而在这一切的中心，就是你。你内心充满了强烈的渴望，迫切地想要得到满足。当那位粉发的女孩轻轻但坚定地将你推向一张属于自己的桌子时，你不用等待太久，就能得到你想要的了。 现在脱下了那些烦人的衣服，红发的女孩凯特欢快地走过来，搓着双手说道：“你确实应该得到这个。 特别的 注意， [pc.name]哦， 做 [pc.heShe]当她脱掉你同样赤裸的粉色角色Cait的衣服时，你也得脱掉自己的衣服。 [pc.armor]. [pc.hasRealCock |她对你温柔地低语着。 [pc.cock]她轻轻地上下摩擦着你的鼻子，尽情地吸入你身上那令人陶醉的香气，然后缓缓地将舌头沿着你的身体向下移动，留下一道长长的、湿润的痕迹，而你的身体也随之变得越来越兴奋，让你不由得屏住了呼吸。 |看到你那湿润的嘴唇，她忍不住舔了舔自己的嘴唇。 [pc.vag]但她并没有立刻深入其中——而是先轻吻了一下，同时用手指轻轻抚弄着上面的皮肤，这种如同女祭司般的触碰，让那些最敏感的部位感受到了无比的愉悦。 ] 但就在粉红凯特准备对你发起攻击的时候，红凯特跨坐在你身上，挡住了你的视线。 [pc.chest]嗯…… [pc.hasRealCock |宝石；装饰物 |天使 ]让我来测试一下你的舌头……” 你唯一需要做的——也是她所需要的唯一回应——就是张开嘴，让她来触碰你的舌头。 [cait.ass]她满怀爱意地接受了你热切的崇拜。 当你将脸埋进她那神圣的大腿之间时，愉悦的感觉便开始从你体内涌出…… [pc.crotch]你向不朽的玛拉赫祈祷，感谢他赐予你这个五彩斑斓的猫咪后宫……
rows.raw: ' Roaring fire, hot dinner, cold drinks, and convivial company: you couldn’t ask for much more than an evening at the Frost Hound. After a long day of hiking, fighting, and adventure, it’s always heavenly to take off your pack, put up your feet, and unwind by the fire before a good night’s rest. You smile as you sip your drink, another of Gwyn’s tasty meals in your belly, content to sit back and people-watch for a while. A few burly loggers gesture with their hands and their mugs off to the side, one of them clearly in the midst of a "no shit, there I was" story. A few tables away, humans and lupines crowd around a young wolf-girl and a beardless human, chanting as the pair struggle through the last few rounds of a drinking contest. And at the bar, Garth is good-naturedly chuckling at a flustered human’s awkward attempts to seduce a dove-winged, dark-skinned male wyld elf. Ah, the Frost Hound: an island of good cheer and normal life in the midst of all this mess you’ve landed in. Cold rushes in unexpectedly as the door swings open, but the new arrival closes it again quickly. It’s Cait, slightly shivering, with a messenger bag over her shoulder. She waves to you, then comes over, picking her way between the tables with considerable care. Her right hand stays firmly on the messenger bag, protecting it from jostling or damage, and when she pulls up a stool next to the fire she makes sure to sit with her right side away from the heat. "Mmm," she sighs happily, half-closing her baby blue eyes. "That feels good." No kidding. It’s pretty frigid out there. "Nothing like being back home in Jassira, lover, that’s for sure!" So, what’s in the bag? "Oh, this?" she teases. "These are my hair dyes! My last kit got ruined when the cultists attacked our wagon, and it’s taken until now for Ivris to be able to find all the ingredients and mix me up a fresh batch." She opens the top of the bag, and shows you a nearly endless array of colorful potions, with every color in the spectrum represented in bewildering and minute variations: a green and an emerald and a celadon and a chartreuse, a crimson and an auburn and a scarlet and a vermilion...and, of course, pink. You’d never realized before that she had more than just the one dye, but you suppose it makes sense. "Some of these colors are really hard to get in the Frost Marches, and she went to the trouble anyway! She’s such a sweetie, isn’t she?" That she is. "They’re surprisingly kind of volatile, though, especially when they’re freshly brewed, so I’d better get these to my room right away!" Cait stands to leave, still talking to you, with her hand firmly on the bag. "I’ll be back down in a min-aaaaaah!" You see Cait’s eyes widen as her foot unexpectedly makes contact with your pack on the floor, causing her to stumble. Her hands and tail instinctively flail as she works to keep her balance — successfully, just like any self-respecting catgirl — but as she lets go of the bag, it keeps swinging, and out of the open top fly potions of every shade and persuasion. The rainbow of stoppered flasks hangs in the air for a long moment, each catching a glint off the fire, and then as they rain down onto the Frost Hound’s tables and floor they shatter, releasing huge clouds of colorful smoke that twist and billow, filling the whole room with roiling tempests of orange and blue and purple that merge and blend until everything and everyone is obscured in thick, impenetrable, undifferentiated white. Cait’s the first person you see when the smoke dissipates, coughing from the smoke and clutching an empty bag with a look of abject horror all over her face. Somehow, she’s been hit by a dye too, and where her hair had once been blonde with pink highlights, she’s now a totally pink-haired kitty. "Oh...oh my..." she murmurs weakly. And then, through the rest of the thinning haze, you see two dozen pairs of cat’s eyes open. [var0] Where once elves, humans, lupines, and goblins had sat drinking and eating, there is now a veritable army of Caits, all dressed in white temple priestess garb and each blinking a pair of kitten’s baby blues. The only difference is their hair[cait.isLeothran| and fur|]: here a cobalt-blue Cait, there a viridian Cait, a goldenrod Cait, a russet Cait, a tawny Cait. A different color of dye for each new catgirl. One Cait with watermelon green and red hair near the door giggles happily. "Oh, Mallach, just look at all of us!" "Mmm," purrs a platinum blonde as she plays with her [cait.breasts]. A Cait with riotously purple hair wiggles her [cait.hips]. "We’ve got two temples’ worth of priestesses in here now!" "Unf," groans a red Cait, biting her lip and closing her eyes at the thought. She idly plays with her amaranth tail. "I think we should do what priestesses do best..." Your pink-haired Cait’s jaw hangs open as she surveys the room, taking in the startling variety of color-variant copies, until she finally closes it with an abrupt clack. Then she turns to you, grinning mischievously. "Does that sound good to you, [pc.name]? Do you want to join us in worship?" Oh gods, do you. At that, the whole room cheers. Caits swarm other Caits, their fingers and tongues eagerly dipping into hot, soaking cat-slits. Priestess robes fly off with abandon, piling uselessly on the floor as Caits commandeer whole tables for their lusty prayers. They giggle and purr and moan, each one blessed not only with the divine skills to bring release, but with an intimate knowledge of their partners’ deepest desires impossible for any other being to match. Their tails, each endowed with a different, brilliant shade, wiggle and entwine as Caits bring each other ever-closer to toe-curling joy. The whole room becomes a dazzling rainbow full of the wet, squelching sounds of perfect catgirl pleasure. And in the midst of it all is you, with raw eager want bubbling up inside, just aching to be sated — and, with your pink-haired Cait gently but firmly pushing you over to a table of your own, you won’t be waiting long. Now divested of her meddlesome clothes, the red-haired Cait saunters over, rubbing her hands together gleefully. "You deserve special attention, [pc.name]." "Oh, does [pc.heShe]," husks your similarly-nude pink Cait as she removes your [pc.armor]. [pc.hasRealCock |She coos at your [pc.cock], gently rubbing her nose up and down it to get a full draft of your heady musk, then slowly runs her tongue down the side, leaving a long, wet trail down your increasingly turgid member that makes you suck in your breath. |She licks her lips at the sight of your moistening [pc.vag], but doesn’t quite dive in just yet — instead, she kisses it, while gently teasing the skin above it with her fingers, bringing a priestess’s touch to your most sensitive areas. ] But just as Pink Cait is about to go to town on you, Red Cait blocks your view as she straddles your [pc.chest]. "Nnn, [pc.hasRealCock |stud |angel ], let me test out your tongue..." Your only response — the only one she needs — is to open wide and reach for her [cait.ass], and she lovingly accepts your eager worship. With your face buried between her divine thighs and waves of pleasure beginning to emanate from your [pc.crotch], you offer a prayer in thanks to immortal Mallach for your new kaleidoscopic kitty harem... '

rows.original: Your eyes snap open to darkness and shadow...and a distinct lack of rainbow catgirls. Gods damn it. [cait.willBedmate|You do at least have the one Cait, and she’s plenty for you to handle, but mmm, more of her...] After a few minutes ruing the prize wakefulness stole from you, you sigh, roll over, and do your best to get a few more hours’ sleep.

rows.original: The ring is packed tonight, filled to the brim with orcs of all shapes, sizes, and even colors. This is supposed to be the big match, and no one's going to miss it. Tension fills the air, thick and palpable; several spectators have brought snacks along, but they're untouched for the most part. No one wants to so much as blink for fear of letting slip a crucial moment in this match of the century. "And in one corner, we have the incumbent up to defend her title! Yes, ladies and gentlemen, tonight we have in the ring none other than the crusher of cocks, the pulveriser of pussies, the annihilator of assholes, Arona, the Mean Green!" The massed orcs break out into roars and cheers as Arona struts into the ring, clad in little more than a leather thong and a garishly painted wooden mask. Braziers placed about the ring erupt into flame, throwing burning cinders to the wind; flickering light dances off Arona's well-oiled form, a glowing sheen against the darkness. To complete the dramatic entrance, Arona pumps her fists in the air and lets out a triumphant roar to the heavens, her bare breasts jiggling in full view of the entire clan. She fully intends to win tonight, and she wants you to know it. Around the ring, the Kervus tribe breaks into a deep, powerful chant, the grumbling of thunder in the dark, cloudy sky. "A-ro-na! A-ro-na! A-RO-NA!" "And in the other corner, we have tonight's challenger! [pc.name], [pc.title]! Um, well, to be honest, I don't know why we invited [pc.himHer] here tonight, really. I mean, it's not as if this challenger is anything but B-tier, really, look, [pc.heShe]'s not all that [pc.mf|handsome|pretty] and to make matters worse I think [pc.heShe]'s got weak arms to boot. Seriously, I don't see what all this fuss is about, but I suppose we'll just have to put up with it until the Mean Green decides to put [pc.himHer] out of [pc.hisHer] misery and ream [pc.hisHer] ass. Now that'll be a good show!" [pc.isDK|B-tier? B-tier?! Yeah, there'll b-tears in this lousy announcer's eyes all right when you're through with Arona and this nonsense. You'll personally make sure of that.|] In come the harpies, the spoils of the tribe's last successful raid. Trussed up as they are, they're in no shape to resist the orcs as they're marched ringside, squawking and struggling but managing to put up little meaningful opposition. One — a rather exotic, tanned specimen — is brought before you in nothing but her birthday suit, and Arona claims one of the feathery cumrag's sisters for herself. You know how this is supposed to go. Speed only matters if it's a tie; all you have to do is outfuck Arona and go through more harpies than she can manage. Easier said than done, of course, but the concept is simple. Forced to kneel before you, the captive harpy looks wide-eyed at the chanting orcs, at Arona, then at you, sheer terror written in her gaze. [pc.isDK|There, it'll be all right. You'll make this quick, and then she won't feel anything anymore for a good long time.|Sorry. That's the way the game goes, it's either you or her, and you're not giving up your ass without a fight.] "Without further ado, let. The. Games. BEGIN!" Arona flexes for the crowd not once but twice, then rips off her thong, snapping apart the flimsy garment and letting it fall to the ground. Her [arona.cock] is already half-hard from the sheer excitement of the crowd, and a few strokes from her hand has it nice and turgid for the trembling harpy in front of her. Licking her lips, the orc amazoness bends over the feathery cumrag and starts pounding her from behind, forcing out salacious moans and squawks from the poor thing. One... two... eleven... twelve. In a mere twelve thrusts of her [arona.cock], the Mean Green has reduced the harpy before her into an insensate, blubbering puddle of fuck on the ground, unable to form a coherent thought, let alone a word. Grinning, Arona turns to the crowd, posing her gleaming, well-oiled body while orcs cheer from the stands and another harpy is dragged into the ring. "A-ro-na! A-ro-na! A-RO-NA!" "And the first conquest of the evening goes to the Mean Green! Meanwhile, our poor contender hasn't even so much as begun! Better hurry up, [pc.name]! Don't want to be left behind, not with your — aha — behind at stake here!" Fine, fine! You were just going to pace yourself, that's all! Not much point in going fast when you don't have any sustain, right? Right? The crowd just jeers. [pc.toughnessRange 80| Oh, that's it. You'll show them all. Grabbing the harpy at your feet, you plunge your [pc.cock] straight into her mouth and begin to face-fuck the feathery cumrag with all your might. The harpy's face reddens and her eyes dart this way and that, desperately seeking escape, but there's none to be had; at length, her muffled cries turn to moans as her mind melts under the strain of your rough fucking. Not that harpies were the most level-headed of creatures in the first place, but this is something else altogether. rows.original: You enter a glade as you walk in the woods, when suddenly a tall, well-muscled man jumps out in front of you. "I am sorry," he proclaims, covering his face with a hand, "I never reveal myself to mortals, but you are so beautiful and elegant I could not stop myself!" A little concerned, you take a step back and demand who the hell he is. And why is he sparkling? "It is true," he says, apparently ignoring you, "that I am a cursed creature who is immortal and really beautiful and strong, and have the special power to read people’s minds, and have to drink blood, but fear not! For I have forsworn the blood of people, and drink only from animals." Wait, rewind a bit to the reading minds part. That’s rather creepy. The rest of the conversation goes in much the same vein, with him admitting that he’s been stalking you for some time, but claiming that it was out of love, which makes it okay. Love makes everything okay, didn’t you know? Finally, after a long tedious dialog in which the man makes himself seem more and more creepy and disturbed, you at last wake up from the bizarre dream. Shaking your head at the sheer oddity of it all, you turn over in your bed[atCamp|roll] and try to catch what few hours of sleep you have left.

rows.original: You wake up in your own bed, momentarily confused about your dream. There were strange creatures, talking animals, demons... at any rate, you are happy to be back again. You don’t feel like there is anything in particular that you have to do today, so you linger in bed for a while before getting up and heading for the door. Perhaps some warm sunshine will do you some good, ease the aches out of your bones; the Frost Marches were really, really cold. There's a bit of confusion as you step outside. Surely, the sky wasn’t green yesterday? And you're pretty sure that there wasn’t a large moat surrounding your house. No matter, you think as you wade across it, at least you are finally back home. You’ll get all this sorted out once you’ve fully woken up. Unfortunately, reality settles in soon enough. This time you wake up for real, as far from home as when you went to sleep. Pinching yourself to make sure this isn't yet another dream, you sigh and lie back down, trying to get in what remains of the night.
rows.translation: 你在自己的床上醒来，一时之间还不太清楚自己刚才做了什么梦。梦里出现了一些奇怪的生物、会说话的动物，还有恶魔……不过，能够再次回到现实世界，你感到非常开心。今天你并没有什么特别要做的事情，于是就在床上多躺了一会儿，然后才起身走向门口。 或许一些温暖的阳光会对你有所帮助，缓解你身上的酸痛吧；霜冻之地确实冷极了。 当你走出门外时，会感到一阵困惑——昨天天空难道不是绿色的吗？而且你也很确定自己的房子周围并没有一条宽阔的护城河。 没关系，当你艰难地穿过这一切时，至少你终于回到了家。等你完全清醒过来，这一切都会得到解决。 可惜，现实很快就会摆到你面前。这一次，你是真正醒了过来，而且你离家的距离，和入睡时一样遥远。 掐自己一下，确认这真的不是在做梦…… 另一个 你闭上眼睛，轻轻叹息，然后再次躺下，试图在剩下的这段夜晚里继续休息。
rows.raw: " You wake up in your own bed, momentarily confused about your dream. There were strange creatures, talking animals, demons... at any rate, you are happy to be back again. You don’t feel like there is anything in particular that you have to do today, so you linger in bed for a while before getting up and heading for the door. Perhaps some warm sunshine will do you some good, ease the aches out of your bones; the Frost Marches were really, really cold. There's a bit of confusion as you step outside. Surely, the sky wasn’t green yesterday? And you're pretty sure that there wasn’t a large moat surrounding your house. No matter, you think as you wade across it, at least you are finally back home. You’ll get all this sorted out once you’ve fully woken up. Unfortunately, reality settles in soon enough. This time you wake up for real, as far from home as when you went to sleep. Pinching yourself to make sure this isn't yet another dream, you sigh and lie back down, trying to get in what remains of the night."

rows.original: [atCamp| You hear a scream and jolt to the waking world, only to find [companion1.name] in your tent, trembling as [companion1.heShe] presses up against you. "[pc.name], there’s a monster in my tent," the [companion1.race] says, as soon as [companion1.heShe] sees you're awake. You knew [companion1.name] could be a little childish, but to this extent? You roll your eyes in exasperation, but still, if that’s what it’s going to take, you might as well do it. You push past [companion1.name], cross over to [companion1.hisHer] tent, and push open the flaps to peer inside. There, you see a terrified, wide-eyed [companion1.name] huddled in the darkness, trembling from head to toe. "[pc.name]," [companion1.heShe] whispers, "I'm so glad you're here. There's a monster lurking outside my tent." You start to rise up, but bump your head against the tent pole, and your eyes shoot open for real this time. Just in case, you cross over and check in on [companion1.name], but [companion1.heShe]'s tucked in [companion1.hisHer] tent just fine. | You hear a scream and jolt to the waking world, only to find [companion1.name] sitting up in [companion1.hisHer] bed, clutching the sheets practically up to [companion1.hisHer] eyes. "[pc.name], there’s a monster under my bed," the [companion1.race] says, as soon as [companion1.heShe] sees you. You knew [companion1.name] could be a little childish, but to this extent? You roll your eyes in exasperation, but still, if that’s what it’s going to take, you might as well do it. You get down on your knees on the hardwood floor, then lean down on your hands, and look under the bed. There, you see a terrified, wide-eyed [companion1.name] huddled in the darkness, trembling from head to toe. "[pc.name]," [companion1.heShe] whispers, "there's a monster on my bed." You start to rise up, but bump your head against the bed, and your eyes shoot open for real this time. Warily, you glance over at the bed across from you, but [companion1.name] is tucked in just fine.] What an odd dream... hopefully you don't get more like it when you go back to bed.
rows.translation: [atCamp| 你听到一声尖叫，猛然惊醒，却发现自己…… [companion1.name] 在自己的帐篷里，瑟瑟发抖…… [companion1.heShe] 紧贴着你的身体。 "[pc.name]我的帐篷里有一只怪物。 那个 [companion1.race] 据说，一……就会发生…… [companion1.heShe] 看到你已经醒了。 你早就知道了。 [companion1.name] 虽然有点孩子气，但到了这种地步吗？你无奈地翻了个白眼，不过既然非得这么做，那还不如干脆完成它吧。你推开门走了进去。 [companion1.name]转移到…… [companion1.hisHer] 掀开帐篷的帘幕，向里面望去。 就在那里，你会看到一个惊恐万分、双眼圆睁的人…… [companion1.name] 蜷缩在黑暗中，全身都在颤抖。 "[pc.name]," [companion1.heShe] 低语声， 真高兴你来了，我的帐篷外面有只怪物在潜伏着。 你开始试图站起来，却撞到了帐篷的支柱，这一下你终于彻底清醒了过来。为了保险起见，你还是过去确认一下情况吧。 [companion1.name]但是 [companion1.heShe]已经吃饱了。 [companion1.hisHer] 帐篷搭得很好。 | 你突然听到一声尖叫，猛然惊醒，却发现…… [companion1.name] 坐起来 [companion1.hisHer] 她躺在床上，几乎把床单都紧紧抱在怀里。 [companion1.hisHer] 眼睛。 "[pc.name]我的床底下有怪物。 那个 [companion1.race] 据说，一旦……就会发生。 [companion1.heShe] 见啦。 你早就知道了。 [companion1.name] 可能有点幼稚吧，但到了这种地步？你无奈地翻了个白眼，不过既然非得这么做，那还不如干脆动手吧。你跪在硬木地板上，然后双手撑地，往床底下看去。 就在那里，你看到了一个惊恐万分、双眼圆睁的…… [companion1.name] 蜷缩在黑暗中，全身都在颤抖。 "[pc.name]," [companion1.heShe] 低语声， 我的床上有一只怪物。 你试图坐起来，却撞到了床头，这次你的眼睛真的睁开了。你小心翼翼地瞥了一眼对面的床…… [companion1.name] 它被安放得非常妥当。] 真是个奇怪的梦……希望你再睡觉时不会再做这样的梦。

rows.original: You’re arguing with Ogrish, trying to get the orc to come around to your point of view. It’s just that the armor he was selling was all very fine when it was on the display shelf, but there’s just something about it... or rather, was something about it after you’d made the purchase. "Yes?" See, when that monster hit you — and not repeatedly, just once. When that monster hit you once, that armor you bought from him didn’t quite perform as expected. Ogrish doesn’t seem too happy at that. "Now, [pc.mf|sir|madam], are you impugning my abilities as a blacksmith? If anything takes a hard enough blow, it’ll buckle." No, no, no. You don’t quite think you’re on the same page here. The armor you bought didn’t bend. It didn’t buckle. What it did was quite literally fall apart into its constituent pieces, leaving you in little more than your underwear — it sprang off your body like a gods-be-damned frightened animal, doing the exact opposite of what armor does! It’s a miracle you managed to escape the horde of ghosts and goblins alive. That, you believe, crosses a certain line, and you want your money back! "Now look here. I don’t do refunds. Plus, you’ve got no way of proving what you just said actually happened at all." You don’t quite remember what happens next, but when you wake up you’re punching the air. Maybe you should see to talking to Ogrish when you wake up for good... but for now, you need to get all the sleep you can.
rows.translation: 你正在和奥格瑞什争论，试图让这个兽人接受你的观点。问题在于，他出售的那些盔甲在展示架上看起来确实都很不错，但就是有点……或者说， 是 在购买之后，你会感受到其中的一些特别之处。 是吗？ 你看，当那个怪物攻击你的时候——而且只是这一次，只攻击你一次。就在那个怪物攻击你的那一刻…… 曾经你从他那里买的那种盔甲，效果并不像预期的那样好。 看来奥格瑞什对此并不太满意。 现在， [pc.mf|先生|夫人]你是在质疑我作为一名铁匠的能力吗？只要受到足够猛烈的撞击，任何东西都会断裂的。 不，不，不。你显然没有理解我的意思。你买的那些盔甲并没有弯曲，也没有变形。实际上，它们完全分解成了碎片，最后你身上就只剩下内裤了——那些盔甲就像受惊的动物一样，从你身上弹了开来。 这与护甲的作用完全相反！ 你能活着从那些鬼魂和地精的包围中逃脱，简直是个奇迹。 那个你认为，当情况越过某个界限时，你就应该把钱要回来！ 现在听好了。我是不会退款给你的。而且，你根本没有任何办法证明你刚才所说的事情确实发生过。 你不太记得接下来发生了什么，但当你醒来时，发现自己在挥拳击打空气。也许等你彻底清醒后，应该去和奥格瑞什谈谈……不过现在，你最需要做的就是尽可能多地睡觉。

It’s just that the armor he was selling was all very fine when it was on the display shelf, but there’s just something about it... or rather, was something about it after you’d made the purchase. "Yes?" See, when that monster hit you — and not repeatedly, just once. When that monster hit you once, that armor you bought from him didn’t quite perform as expected. Ogrish doesn’t seem too happy at that. "Now, [pc.mf|sir|madam], are you impugning my abilities as a blacksmith? If anything takes a hard enough blow, it’ll buckle." No, no, no. You don’t quite think you’re on the same page here. The armor you bought didn’t bend. It didn’t buckle. What it did was quite literally fall apart into its constituent pieces, leaving you in little more than your underwear — it sprang off your body like a gods-be-damned frightened animal, doing the exact opposite of what armor does! It’s a miracle you managed to escape the horde of ghosts and goblins alive. That, you believe, crosses a certain line, and you want your money back! "Now look here. I don’t do refunds. Plus, you’ve got no way of proving what you just said actually happened at all." You don’t quite remember what happens next, but when you wake up you’re punching the air. Maybe you should see to talking to Ogrish when you wake up for good... but for now, you need to get all the sleep you can.'

rows.original: Above you, the dark canopy of the pine forest. Below you, slush and snow, sucking at your feet, forcing you to move sluggishly, far too sluggishly. Dark shapes flit through the trees, some on two legs, some on all fours; they're always almost upon you, never too far away as they hound your steps. It's one of the oldest games to be played in the Frost Marches: survive until dawn, and the Jarl invites you to dinner with a bag of gold. Don't, and well... you're dinner. It makes no sense at first, why they haven't already closed in for the kill, but eventually, grim realization dawns: they're herding you towards someone, somewhere, moving prey towards the killzone by funneling you into the inevitable. You're tiring quickly, the noose is tightening, but if you stop now, the pack will be more than happy to tear your throat out here. And then you reach the end of the line, a clearing in the forest where the Jarl himself is waiting. Shaggy-furred, snaggle-toothed, two demonic horns sprouting from his brow and curling back across his head, Garret leaps into action. Truly, is it Garret? A shade of the past, a wraith-touched ancestor, or it is a dark mirror of the future, the Garret of the world Kasyrra intends to create? A huge wolfshead medallion hangs from a thick gold chain about his neck, and blue fire blazes where his eyes should be, licking away at vacant sockets. The thing that might be Garret hurtles forward in one fluid motion, a savage grin on his muzzle as he tackles you to the ground. Enormous amounts of solid muscle hold you firmly in place as he regards you with those empty blue eyes, pity and contempt rolled up into one cruel package; you can't even move an inch in his cold, icy embrace. "Well, little morsel. You chose to play the game, and lost." He can't do this! There are rules! "Yes, there are rules. But you broke them. How dare you? How DARE you?! Now, you've forfeited any mercies you might have had under the Old Wyld." The pack closes in about him. In the dim moonlight, you can see them clearly now, twisted caricatures of lupine folk. Their bodies are misshapen but strong; the weak died and were mourned a long time ago. Garret backs up a little, just enough for him to thrust the full length of his veined, throbbing dogmeat in your face. Fully out of its sheath, knot bulging and full to bursting, the heady odour that rises off it is to die for. Quite literally so, given your current situation. "I, Jarl Garret Gunvaldsen, declare this hunt over! To the best hunter goes the best portions of the kill!" Snarling and slavering, the pack starts closing in, the tiny circle of space you're in shrinking by the second. Garret gives you a toothy smile, then rips apart your clothing with practiced ease, his ebony, hook-ended claws making short work of any resistance. "Prepare your ass." Waking up, you're certain your feet are sprinkled with a light dusting of snow. You shake your feet a bit just to be sure, then turn over and head back to bed.
rows.translation: 你的头顶是松林茂密的黑暗树冠，脚下则是泥泞的雪地，它们紧紧缠住你的双脚，迫使你行动得极其缓慢。黑暗中的身影在树林间穿梭，有的用两条腿行走，有的则四肢着地；它们始终紧追不舍，仿佛离你只有一步之遥。 这是在霜冻之地最古老的游戏之一：活到黎明，那么领主就会请你吃晚餐，并赏你一袋黄金。而如果你没能活下来……嗯，后果就不用说了。 你是 晚餐。 起初，你根本不明白他们为什么还不直接发起攻击，但最终，你逐渐意识到了一个残酷的事实：他们正在把你们引向某个地方，就像把猎物驱赶到致命的区域一样，让你们不可避免地落入圈套。 你很快就感到疲惫不堪了，绞索正在一点点收紧，但如果你现在停下来，那些家伙肯定会非常乐意在这里割断你的喉咙。 然后，你终于走到了这条路的尽头——一片森林中的空地，而贾尔本人正在那里等着你。 毛发蓬乱，牙齿参差不齐，两根恶魔般的角从他的额头上伸出，蜿蜒延伸至头顶后方，加勒特立刻行动了起来。但，这真的是加勒特吗？他是过去的某个影子，还是被怨灵影响的祖先？又或者是未来世界的镜像——那个卡西拉打算创造出来的加勒特呢？ 一根粗重的金链子上悬挂着一枚巨大的狼头奖章，他的脖子上戴着这条链子；而在他本该有眼睛的地方，蓝色的火焰正在燃烧，不断吞噬着那些空洞的眼窝。 那个可能就是加勒特的人以一种流畅的动作冲了上来，他脸上带着凶残的笑容，将你扑倒在地。 在他用那双空洞的蓝眼睛注视你的时候，巨大的肌肉力量将你牢牢地固定在那里，怜悯与蔑视交织在一起，形成了一种残酷的力量；在他冰冷而坚硬的怀抱中，你甚至无法动弹一分一毫。 哼，小家伙。是你自己选择了参与这个游戏，然后又输了。 他不能这么做！有规则在呢！ 是的，确实有规则。但你们违反了这些规则。你们怎么敢这样？ 你竟敢如此！？ 现在，你已经彻底失去了在旧荒野时期可能还拥有的任何怜悯之心了。 那群生物逐渐将他包围起来。在昏暗的月光下，你可以清楚地看到它们——那些被扭曲变形的、类似狼人的生物。它们的身体残缺不堪，但却异常强壮；那些弱小的个体早已死去，也早已被人们哀悼过了。加勒特微微后退了几步，正好让那些布满血管、不断跳动着的“肉块”能够完全伸到你的面前。那些从鞘中拔出的“肉块”上，结节凸出，充满了令人作呕的腥臭味……在这种情况下，这种气味简直让人欲罢不能。 我，贾尔·加雷特·冈瓦尔德森，宣布这次狩猎结束！最优秀的猎人将获得最多的猎物！ 那些野兽咆哮着、流着口水，开始逐渐逼近，你所处的那片狭小空间正在每秒钟都在缩小。加勒特对你露出一个狰狞的笑容，然后以熟练的动作撕开了你的衣服——他那漆黑的、带钩的爪子，轻而易举地破坏了任何抵抗。 做好心理准备吧。 醒来时，你发现自己的脚上仿佛落了一层薄薄的雪。你轻轻抖了抖脚，确认了一下，然后又翻了个身，继续睡了下去。

rows.original: The elf queen is reclining on a grand throne of ice, cushioned by furs and fanned by barely-clothed attendants despite the freezing cold. Her pale skin shines with scented oils, perfectly accentuating her well-toned muscles and full breasts. [etheryn.highConfidence|To your bemusement, you realize that the powerful queen before is Etheryn, although hardly the Etheryn you know. Perhaps this is what Etheryn feels like inside, the Etheryn you helped create — she only wears jewelry, large bands of silver and iron, studded with the most opulent of star sapphires and flawless diamonds.|The Queen herself only wears jewelry, large bands of silver and iron, studded with the most opulent of star sapphires and flawless diamonds.] From your kneeling position, you have an excellent view of her shaved crotch and prominent flower of womanhood, which she flaunts casually, her legs spread as she looks down on you. You’re vaguely aware of the elf ladies and lords sitting in the stands, the high nobility of pale elf society come to watch the spectacle. Rare is it that the Queen herself presides over trials. Whichever way this goes, no doubt it will be the talk of the Winter City for days to come, if not weeks. rows.original:
The world is changing, and you along with it.

    Nearly a year ago, you set off on your own, leaving your former life behind to seek your fortunes on the wild frontier — a year of traveling and exploring, living on the edge of the fallen empires of yesteryear. You've earned yourself a little coin in your adventures, enough to book passage to the northernmost reaches of the known world: the Frost Marches.
    
    You had just made it to the village of Hawkethorne, a little hamlet nestled between two ranges of craggy mountains and the endless boreal forests of the north, when the weather turned foul. What started as an autumn downpour has turned into an unseasonable blizzard, several months earlier than you'd expected first snow. The storm has only gotten more and more ferocious in the last few days, building up to a furious howl that's made continuing your journey untenable. Lucky for you, the only inn in town — a little place called the Frost Hound — had several spare rooms, though renting one for the storm's duration took the last of your spare coin.
    
    A towering old wolf-man named Garth runs the place along with his daughter Gwyneth, the serving girl. She's pregnant, mere days from being due she says, and is the most cheerful person you've seen so far in the wintery town. Her father is gruff and reserved, but the two of them are your only company most days. At night, a few of the local shopkeepers and traders will come in for a drink or a game of cards, but the storm makes even small ventures down the dirt-packed road a less than appealing proposition.
    
    It's been a quiet, lonely couple of days that lend themselves to contemplation about the year you've spent on the road, the life you've left behind, and who you've become...
rows.translation:
世界正在发生变化，你也在随之改变。

差不多一年前，你独自踏上了这段旅程，抛下了过去的生活，前往那片荒凉的边疆去追寻自己的命运。这一年来，你不断旅行、不断探索，生活在那些早已衰落的帝国的废墟之中。在你的冒险中，你赚到了一些钱，这些钱足以让你买到前往已知世界最北端的船票——那就是霜冻之地。
    
    你刚刚抵达霍克索恩村——这个坐落在两座崎岖山脉与北方无边无际的北方森林之间的小村庄，天气却突然变坏了。原本只是秋天的阵雨，却演变成了一场不合时节的暴风雪，降雪的时间比你预想的早了好几个月。 在过去的几天里，这场风暴变得愈发猛烈，其呼啸声已经大到让你继续前进变得根本不可能。幸运的是，镇上唯一的一家客栈——名叫“霜猎犬”的小店——还有几间空房间。不过，租用这些房间来躲避这场风暴，让你剩下的所有钱都花光了。
    
    在这个小镇上，有一位身材高大的老狼人，名叫加思，他和他的女儿格温妮丝一起管理着这个地方。格温妮丝是一名仆人，她现在怀孕了，据说再过几天就要分娩了，但她是这个冬日小镇上你见过的最开朗的人。她的父亲性格粗犷、寡言少语，但大多数时候，他们父子俩就是你在这个小镇上唯一的陪伴。到了晚上，会有几位当地的店主和商贩过来喝一杯或者打几局牌，不过由于暴风雨的缘故，即使只是沿着这条布满尘土的道路走一小段距离，也变得变得很不方便了。
    
    这两天过得格外宁静而孤独，这种氛围让我有机会仔细思考自己这一年来在路上的经历、抛在身后的生活，以及自己如今已经变成了什么样的人……
