rows.original: There are countless races of people in the world of Savarra, but five are perhaps most common in the shattered lands of the former Belharan Empire, the realm from which you hail. [var0] Humans are the most populous race of Savarra, once heirs to the great empires of the south, though they hold little sway here in the Frost Marches. Their time came and now has faded, leaving sparse few in these parts. The beast-kin races — the wolf-like lupines especially — are far more prominent here, living in semi-nomadic tribes and small villages like Hawkethorne. The northern reaches have been home to their kin long before the first human set foot in these lands. Daring catfolk merchants and adventurers come to the Frost Marches in search of riches and new horizons, far removed from their desert home. Brave and cunning, these wayfarers are few in number but have eagerly carved out a place for themselves amidst the deep forests and rolling hills of the northlands. Catfolk females go into a regular heat, increasing their fertility. Wyld elves, touched by ancient primal powers, once stood alongside humans as equal heirs to the great Belharan Empire of old. Today, many still live in the Imperial cities that remain, but more and more have returned to the wilds, finding wisdom in the old ways. Even now, some hardy explorers venture north in hopes of making contact with their long-isolated cousins in the heart of the snow-blown forests. Heartlander orcs are a settled, agrarian people, distantly removed from the wild and untamed barbarians heard of in legends of the Marches. They are a tall and tough people, hard working and passionate, but with warbands of islander orcs now blighting the coasts of the nearby Kingdom of Khor'minos, taking slaves and pillaging villages, only the bravest come north where they might face their distant kin. Orc males go into a regular rut, increasing their virility. Your birth race tells you something about the kin and culture you descend from. It increases your starting Attributes, and may be referenced during some events that rely on your upbringing, but the Frost Marches are lands of wild magic and endless possibility. Your race is not set in stone once chosen. What race do you descend from? Hover over each option to read additional details about it.
rows.translation: 在萨瓦拉的世界中，存在着无数不同的种族，但在曾经属于贝拉兰帝国的这片土地上，有五种种族或许最为常见——而你们，正是来自这个帝国的地区。 [var0] 人类是萨瓦拉星球上人口最多的种族，他们曾经是南方那些伟大帝国的继承者，但在冰霜边境地区，他们已经失去了昔日的影响力。他们的辉煌时代已经过去，如今只有少数人类还居住在这些地方。 在这里，那些兽人种族——尤其是那些外形像狼的卢皮恩人——显得更为突出。他们以半游牧的生活方式生活，聚居在诸如霍克索恩这样的小村庄里。早在人类首次踏上这片土地之前，这些地区的北部地区就已经成为了他们族群的栖息地。 勇敢的猫人商人和冒险者们来到冰霜边境，寻找财富和新的机遇，他们远离了自己那片沙漠家园。这些既勇敢又狡黠的旅人虽然人数不多，但已经在北方广袤的森林和连绵的山丘中为自己开辟出了一片生存空间。 猫人女性会进入正常的发情期，此时她们的生育能力会增强。那些被远古原始力量所影响的野精灵，曾经与人类一同，作为古老贝拉兰帝国的平等继承者而共存。如今，虽然仍有许多野精灵居住在那些幸存下来的帝国城市中，但越来越多的人回到了荒野之中，从那些古老的传统中寻找智慧。 直到如今，仍有一些坚韧的探险者冒险向北方进发，希望能与那些被冰雪覆盖的森林深处与世隔绝的亲戚们取得联系。 那些居住在内陆地区的兽人是一个定居下来的农业民族，他们与那些在边境传说中出现的野蛮人截然不同。 他们是一个高大而坚韧的民族，勤劳且充满热情。然而，现在一些岛上的兽人部落正在肆虐邻近的科尔米诺斯王国的海岸线，抓走奴隶、洗劫村庄。只有最勇敢的人才会向北方进发，去面对那些远方的同族。 兽人男性会进入一种固定的生理周期，这种周期会增强他们的雄性特征。 你的种族决定了你所属的族群以及你所继承的文化传统。它会影响你初始的各项属性，并且在某些需要考虑你成长背景的事件中也会起到作用。然而，冰霜之地充满了狂野的魔法与无限的可能，因此一旦选择了种族，它其实并不会一成不变。 你属于哪个种族呢？将鼠标悬停在每个选项上，就能查看关于该种族的更多详细信息。
rows.raw: " There are countless races of people in the world of Savarra, but five are perhaps most common in the shattered lands of the former Belharan Empire, the realm from which you hail. [var0] Humans are the most populous race of Savarra, once heirs to the great empires of the south, though they hold little sway here in the Frost Marches. Their time came and now has faded, leaving sparse few in these parts. The beast-kin races — the wolf-like lupines especially — are far more prominent here, living in semi-nomadic tribes and small villages like Hawkethorne. The northern reaches have been home to their kin long before the first human set foot in these lands. Daring catfolk merchants and adventurers come to the Frost Marches in search of riches and new horizons, far removed from their desert home. Brave and cunning, these wayfarers are few in number but have eagerly carved out a place for themselves amidst the deep forests and rolling hills of the northlands. Catfolk females go into a regular heat, increasing their fertility. Wyld elves, touched by ancient primal powers, once stood alongside humans as equal heirs to the great Belharan Empire of old. Today, many still live in the Imperial cities that remain, but more and more have returned to the wilds, finding wisdom in the old ways. Even now, some hardy explorers venture north in hopes of making contact with their long-isolated cousins in the heart of the snow-blown forests. Heartlander orcs are a settled, agrarian people, distantly removed from the wild and untamed barbarians heard of in legends of the Marches. They are a tall and tough people, hard working and passionate, but with warbands of islander orcs now blighting the coasts of the nearby Kingdom of Khor'minos, taking slaves and pillaging villages, only the bravest come north where they might face their distant kin. Orc males go into a regular rut, increasing their virility. Your birth race tells you something about the kin and culture you descend from. It increases your starting Attributes, and may be referenced during some events that rely on your upbringing, but the Frost Marches are lands of wild magic and endless possibility. Your race is not set in stone once chosen. What race do you descend from? Hover over each option to read additional details about it. "

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Presence +1
Heirs to the great Belharan Empire of ages past, humans have spread across the world in spite of their short lives. Theirs is a race that is ever expanding, ever-growing and learning. It is no wonder some would come to the far reaches of the north, seeking new land and new adventures. Humanity's boundless ambitions lend to greater Presence.
rows.translation:
起始加成：存在感 +1  
作为古老贝拉兰帝国的后裔，人类尽管寿命短暂，却依然遍布世界各地。这个种族始终在不断扩张、发展与学习。因此，有些人会前往遥远的北方，去寻找新的土地和新的冒险。人类无边无际的野心，使得他们的存在感更加显著。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Presence +1\nHeirs to the great Belharan Empire of ages past, humans have spread across the world in spite of their short lives. Theirs is a race that is ever expanding, ever-growing and learning. It is no wonder some would come to the far reaches of the north, seeking new land and new adventures. Humanity's boundless ambitions lend to greater Presence."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Strength +1
Tall and powerful, the lupines of the north are descended from lycans and bear thick body fur resembling that of a gray or arctic wolf. Natives of the region, lupines spent several years fighting against the encroaching human presence before being forced to accept defeat, and their new neighbors. Their physiques lend them to higher Strength than other races.
rows.translation:
起始加成：力量 +1  
这些高大强壮的北方狼人，实际上是狼人的后裔，它们拥有类似灰狼或北极狼的浓密体毛。作为该地区的原住民，狼人们曾与不断扩张的人类势力抗争了多年，最终被迫接受失败，也接受了新邻居的存在。由于这样的生理构造，它们在力量方面比其他种族更具优势。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Strength +1\nTall and powerful, the lupines of the north are descended from lycans and bear thick body fur resembling that of a gray or arctic wolf. Natives of the region, lupines spent several years fighting against the encroaching human presence before being forced to accept defeat, and their new neighbors. Their physiques lend them to higher Strength than other races."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Agility +1
Lithe and agile denizens of the endless forests of the north, catfolk are the most sociable of the beast-kin and were eager to join elves and men in society when they were first met in the great deserts of the Southlands. Catfolks' friendliness often underlies a cheeky mischievous streak. Their grace and dexterity give them a naturally higher Agility.
rows.translation:
起始加成：敏捷 +1  
猫人栖息在北方无边无际的森林中，他们身形敏捷灵活，是所有兽人族群中最善于交际的。当他们最初在南方的大沙漠中与精灵和人类相遇时，就非常渴望融入人类的社会生活。猫人的友善性格中往往隐藏着一丝顽皮和调皮捣蛋的倾向，而他们优雅的动作与灵巧的身手，也让他们的敏捷属性天生就高于常人。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Agility +1\nLithe and agile denizens of the endless forests of the north, catfolk are the most sociable of the beast-kin and were eager to join elves and men in society when they were first met in the great deserts of the Southlands. Catfolks' friendliness often underlies a cheeky mischievous streak. Their grace and dexterity give them a naturally higher Agility."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Willpower +1
A fey race possessed of an otherworldly grace, wyld elves have a preternatural connection to nature and magic. They all have a feminine appearance, regardless of actual sex (with some males even sporting breasts), and each elf manifests a mark of the wyld, such as animalistic ears or bestial tails. Their inherent grasp of magic grants wyld elves a bonus to Willpower.
rows.translation:
启动强化效果：意志力 +1  
作为拥有超凡魅力的精灵种族，野精灵与自然与魔法之间存在着一种与生俱来的联系。无论实际性别如何，他们全都拥有女性化的外貌（甚至有些雄性野精灵也会拥有乳房），而且每个野精灵都会展现出某种与野性相关的特征，比如动物般的耳朵或兽类的尾巴。由于他们对魔法有着与生俱来的领悟力，因此野精灵在意志力方面会获得额外的加成。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Willpower +1\nA fey race possessed of an otherworldly grace, wyld elves have a preternatural connection to nature and magic. They all have a feminine appearance, regardless of actual sex (with some males even sporting breasts), and each elf manifests a mark of the wyld, such as animalistic ears or bestial tails. Their inherent grasp of magic grants wyld elves a bonus to Willpower."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Toughness +1
Towering, brawny barbarians with green skin and bestial tusks, orcs are savage raiders that hail from the craggy foothills of the north. Few of them voluntarily join civilization, preferring their tribal lives under the command of powerful warlords. Their naturally thick hides and an ingrained warrior tradition grants them bonus Toughness.
rows.translation:
启动增益效果：坚韧值 +1  
兽人是一种身材高大、体格强壮的野蛮人，他们拥有绿色的皮肤和野性的獠牙，这些凶猛的掠夺者来自北方的崎岖山区。很少有兽人会自愿加入文明社会，他们更喜欢在强大的军阀领导下过部落生活。由于天生的厚皮以及根深蒂固的战斗传统，兽人拥有额外的坚韧值。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Toughness +1\nTowering, brawny barbarians with green skin and bestial tusks, orcs are savage raiders that hail from the craggy foothills of the north. Few of them voluntarily join civilization, preferring their tribal lives under the command of powerful warlords. Their naturally thick hides and an ingrained warrior tradition grants them bonus Toughness."

rows.original:
All wyld elves possess a Mark of Wyld, a primal mutation that signals their close relation to the wilderlands of the world. These traits are not necessarily inherited; it's possible for a mother with deer antlers and a father with cat eyes to produce a child that has a horse's tail. 

    Choose one of the following additional traits.
rows.translation:
所有野生精灵都拥有“野生印记”，这种与生俱来的变异特征表明他们与这个世界上的荒野之地有着密切的联系。这些特征并不一定是遗传的；例如，一位长着鹿角的母亲和一位有着猫眼的父亲，也有可能生出一个长着马尾的孩子。

请从以下额外特征中选择一项。
rows.raw:
"
    All wyld elves possess a Mark of Wyld, a primal mutation that signals their close relation to the wilderlands of the world. These traits are not necessarily inherited; it's possible for a mother with deer antlers and a father with cat eyes to produce a child that has a horse's tail. 

    Choose one of the following additional traits."

rows.original:
Who you are, where you come from, and what you know, are determined by your background. 

    Backgrounds will increase your starting attributes, and many events in the story will change — often subtly, but sometimes in significant ways — due to the knowledge and training inherent to your background. 
    
    Who are you, and where did you start before your year of adventure and travel?
rows.translation:
你的身份、出身背景以及所掌握的知识，都是由你的成长经历决定的。

不同的背景会赋予你不同的初始属性，而故事中的许多事件也会因此而发生变化——这些变化往往很微妙，但有时也会产生深远的影响，这一切都与你所拥有的知识与经历密切相关。

那么，在你开始这段冒险与旅程之前，你究竟是谁？你的起点又在哪里呢？
rows.raw:
"
    Who you are, where you come from, and what you know, are determined by your background. 

    Backgrounds will increase your starting attributes, and many events in the story will change — often subtly, but sometimes in significant ways — due to the knowledge and training inherent to your background. 
    
    Who are you, and where did you start before your year of adventure and travel?"

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Presence +1
You're the youngest child of a noble family, with all the pampering and prestige that entails — not to mention training in arts of magic or battle to your hearts' content. As the youngest child, though, you had little hope of inheriting power and so now seek your own fortunes on the frontier. Your noble upbringing imparts a bonus to Presence.
rows.translation:
起始加成：魅力值+1  
你出身于一个贵族家庭，因此享受着各种宠爱与尊贵地位，更有机会尽情学习魔法或战斗技巧。然而作为家中最小的孩子，你几乎没有机会继承家族权力，因此如今选择前往边疆自谋出路。贵族出身的背景使你在魅力值方面获得额外加成。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Presence +1\nYou're the youngest child of a noble family, with all the pampering and prestige that entails — not to mention training in arts of magic or battle to your hearts' content. As the youngest child, though, you had little hope of inheriting power and so now seek your own fortunes on the frontier. Your noble upbringing imparts a bonus to Presence."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Agility +1
You were born and raised in the wilderness of the northlands, surviving by your skill with a bow and your attunement with nature. Like you, your parents were adventurers, and left early in your life. You're used to living alone — you're quick, quiet, and fleet of foot after years of living in arboreal solitude. Your life as a hunter has given you greater Agility.
rows.translation:
启动增益：敏捷 +1  
你在北方荒野中出生并长大，依靠精湛的弓箭技艺以及对自然的敏锐感知来生存。和你一样，你的父母也是冒险家，在你还很小的时候就离开了你。多年在树林中独自生活，让你变得行动迅速、悄无声息且脚步敏捷。作为猎人的生活使你的敏捷能力得到了进一步提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Agility +1\nYou were born and raised in the wilderness of the northlands, surviving by your skill with a bow and your attunement with nature. Like you, your parents were adventurers, and left early in your life. You're used to living alone — you're quick, quiet, and fleet of foot after years of living in arboreal solitude. Your life as a hunter has given you greater Agility."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Cunning +1
You were trained in the highest institutes of education in the south, which emulate the legendary colleges of ancient Belhar. The constraints of academia grated against you, however, and eventually you had to strike out on your own. Your rich classical education covered the basics of all manner of scholarly pursuits and the secrets of magic, granting a bonus to your Cunning.
rows.translation:
起始加成：狡黠+1  
你曾在南方最顶尖的教育机构接受训练，这些机构仿照了古代贝尔哈尔那些著名的学府而设立。然而，学术界的种种束缚让你感到不堪忍受，最终你不得不选择独自闯荡。你扎实的古典教育为你奠定了各种学术研究的基础，同时也让你掌握了魔法的秘密，因此你的狡黠属性得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Cunning +1\nYou were trained in the highest institutes of education in the south, which emulate the legendary colleges of ancient Belhar. The constraints of academia grated against you, however, and eventually you had to strike out on your own. Your rich classical education covered the basics of all manner of scholarly pursuits and the secrets of magic, granting a bonus to your Cunning."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Strength +1
The life of a soldier in the ruins of the Belharan Empire is hard and brutal, requiring constant physical fitness and training. You've served in conflicts against monsters and barbarians, and now bring your skills and experiences from the frontlines to the frontier. Your rigorous training has given you a bonus to Strength.
rows.translation:
起始加成：力量 +1  
在贝尔哈兰帝国的废墟中，军人的生活充满了艰辛与残酷，他们必须始终保持良好的体魄并不断接受训练。你曾参与过对抗怪物与野蛮人的战斗，如今，你将自己在前线的技能与经验带到了边疆。正是这些严格的训练，使你的力量得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Strength +1\nThe life of a soldier in the ruins of the Belharan Empire is hard and brutal, requiring constant physical fitness and training. You've served in conflicts against monsters and barbarians, and now bring your skills and experiences from the frontlines to the frontier. Your rigorous training has given you a bonus to Strength."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Presence +1
You were a high-class escort in one of the up-and-coming metropolises of the south, always in demand and paid handsomely for your services. You've done it all, with everyone. However, an affair with a powerful noble whose spouse turned against you caused you to flee the city and seek the anonymity of the frontier. Your charisma and manipulative skills increase your Presence.
rows.translation:
启动增益效果：魅力值+1  
你曾是在南方某座发展迅速的大都市中担任高级护送任务的职业人士，你的服务一直备受追捧，也因此获得了丰厚的报酬。你与形形色色的人都有过交往。然而，与一位有权势的贵族发生了恋情，而他的妻子最终转而与你为敌，这迫使你离开那座城市，前往边疆寻求隐居生活。你的魅力与操控他人的能力使你的魅力值得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Presence +1\nYou were a high-class escort in one of the up-and-coming metropolises of the south, always in demand and paid handsomely for your services. You've done it all, with everyone. However, an affair with a powerful noble whose spouse turned against you caused you to flee the city and seek the anonymity of the frontier. Your charisma and manipulative skills increase your Presence."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Presence +1
Once apprenticed to one of the greatest bards in your homeland, you struck out on your own to share your songs and stories across the far frontier. Your career in showmanship has taught you to inspire people and bring them to believe your words and songs, imparting a bonus to Presence.
rows.translation:
起始加成：魅力值 +1  
在成为家乡最伟大的吟游诗人之一的学徒后，你开始独自踏上旅程，将自己的歌曲和故事传播到遥远的边疆地区。在表演艺术领域的长期积累使你学会了如何激励人们，让他们相信你的话语和歌声，因此你的魅力值获得了额外提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Presence +1\nOnce apprenticed to one of the greatest bards in your homeland, you struck out on your own to share your songs and stories across the far frontier. Your career in showmanship has taught you to inspire people and bring them to believe your words and songs, imparting a bonus to Presence."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Willpower +1
You were apprenticed to a hedge witch, a powerful and beautiful enchantress living in the depths of the wilderlands southwest of the Frost Marches. You split on bad terms, forcing you to seek your own fortunes. Your tutelage under the witch has given you a mastery of magic, boosting your Willpower.
rows.translation:
启动强化效果：意志力 +1  
你曾师从一位隐居在霜冻边境西南部荒野深处的强大而美丽的女巫。由于某些原因，你们分道扬镳，迫使你独自闯荡天下。在女巫的指导下，你掌握了丰富的魔法知识，这也使你的意志力得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Willpower +1\nYou were apprenticed to a hedge witch, a powerful and beautiful enchantress living in the depths of the wilderlands southwest of the Frost Marches. You split on bad terms, forcing you to seek your own fortunes. Your tutelage under the witch has given you a mastery of magic, boosting your Willpower."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Toughness +1
You're a barbarian, a savage wildling from beyond the borders of civilization. Though your tribe exemplified the warrior's code of honor and bravery, that did not save them from the orcish raiders who wiped them out. Only you survived, forced to seek out a new life beyond your clan's homelands. Your barbarian prowess grants a bonus to Toughness.
rows.translation:
起始加成：坚韧值 +1  
你是一名野蛮人，一个来自文明边疆之外的野蛮野人。尽管你的部落恪守着战士的荣誉准则与勇敢精神，但这依然无法让他们免遭兽人掠夺者的袭击，最终你的部落被彻底消灭。只有你幸存下来，被迫离开自己的族群家园，去寻找新的生存之路。作为野蛮人，你所拥有的战斗能力使你的坚韧值获得额外加成。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Toughness +1\nYou're a barbarian, a savage wildling from beyond the borders of civilization. Though your tribe exemplified the warrior's code of honor and bravery, that did not save them from the orcish raiders who wiped them out. Only you survived, forced to seek out a new life beyond your clan's homelands. Your barbarian prowess grants a bonus to Toughness."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Agility +1
You were born in the gutter. Your mother was a whore, and you've been existing in the dregs of society ever since you took your first breath. You've stolen, seduced, and fought tooth and nail to survive. Tiring of life in the city of your birth, not to mention the growing demands of the Thieves' Guild, you've set out to make your fortunes in the Frost Marches. Your thieving experience gives you a boost to Agility.
rows.translation:
初始加成：敏捷 +1  
你出生在贫民窟，母亲是个妓女，从你第一次呼吸的那一刻起，你就生活在社会的最底层。你为了生存，不得不偷窃、勾引他人，甚至拼死搏斗。对你出生的这座城市，你早已感到厌倦；更何况，盗贼协会的要求也在不断增加，因此你决定前往冰霜边境去寻找发财的机会。凭借你丰富的偷窃经验，你的敏捷属性得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Agility +1\nYou were born in the gutter. Your mother was a whore, and you've been existing in the dregs of society ever since you took your first breath. You've stolen, seduced, and fought tooth and nail to survive. Tiring of life in the city of your birth, not to mention the growing demands of the Thieves' Guild, you've set out to make your fortunes in the Frost Marches. Your thieving experience gives you a boost to Agility."

rows.original:
Starting Boost: Willpower +1
You were raised in a monastery of the Living Gods, trained in religious ceremony, scholarly pursuits, and the ways of healing magics. You eventually left your order to bring your knowledge and skills to the frontier, eager to help those far from the light of civilization. Your magical training grants you a bonus to Willpower.
rows.translation:
启动加成：意志力 +1  
你在“活神”修道院中长大，接受了宗教仪式、学术研究以及治疗魔法的训练。后来你离开了修道院，将所学的知识和技能带到边疆，渴望帮助那些远离文明之光的人们。你的魔法训练使你的意志力得到了提升。
rows.raw: "Starting Boost: Willpower +1\nYou were raised in a monastery of the Living Gods, trained in religious ceremony, scholarly pursuits, and the ways of healing magics. You eventually left your order to bring your knowledge and skills to the frontier, eager to help those far from the light of civilization. Your magical training grants you a bonus to Willpower."

rows.original: It's a rare breed that set aside the simple life of hearth and home and choose to become adventurers. To succeed, you've had to learn to fight, to protect yourself and those who fight alongside you. The training you've had, and the direction of your growth, is determined by your class. If you wish to be a hard-bitten defender or a wielder of heavy weapons, choose the Warrior class. If you wish to dodge deftly through battle, delivering debilitating strikes, choose the Thief class. To wield powerful elemental magic and summon creatures to fight at your side, choose the Black Mage; if your magic is more about protecting your comrades and smiting evil with a holy weapon, choose the White Mage. The Charmer weaves together unique spell-songs and hexes with dance and sexual suggestion to bolster allies and exploit enemies' desires. Your class determines what you're able to do in combat through a combination of passive perks and active powers, which include things like magic spells and fighting styles. Every class grants you new perks and powers as you gain experience, but with time and practice you can master a huge array of powers from your own class and others. Your choice of class will not restrict what weapons and gear you use, or even what powers you learn, though certain classes will gain greater or lesser benefits from each due to their perks. Through training, it is possible to change your class during your adventures.
rows.translation: 这是一种罕见的职业选择——人们放弃了安稳的家庭生活，毅然决定成为一名冒险者。要想取得成功，就必须学会战斗，学会保护自己以及与自己并肩作战的同伴。你所接受的训练以及你的成长方向，都是由你所选择的职业类别来决定的。 如果你想成为一名经验丰富的防御者，或者是一名擅长使用重型武器的战士，那么请选择相应的职业吧。 战士 类别。如果你想在战斗中灵活闪避，同时给予对手致命一击，那么请选择这个选项。 小偷 职业。要想施展强大的元素魔法，并召唤生物来为你作战，那就选择这个职业吧。 黑魔法师; 如果你的魔法更多是用来保护同伴，并用神圣的武器打击邪恶，那么请选择…… 白魔法师. 这个 魅惑者 它将独特的咒语与舞蹈、性暗示相结合，以此来增强盟友的力量，同时利用敌人的欲望来对付他们。 你的职业决定了你在战斗中能够使用哪些能力，这些能力包括被动技能和主动技能，比如魔法咒语和战斗风格等等。 每个职业都会在你积累经验的过程中赋予你新的能力与技能，但随着时间的推移和不断的练习，你完全可以掌握自己所在职业以及其他职业的各种强大能力。你所选择的职业并不会限制你能够使用哪些武器和装备，也不会影响你能够学习哪些技能；不过，由于不同职业所具有的特殊优势，某些职业在获取某些能力时可能会获得更大的收益，而某些职业则可能会处于劣势。 通过训练，你在冒险过程中可以改变自己的职业。
rows.raw: " It's a rare breed that set aside the simple life of hearth and home and choose to become adventurers. To succeed, you've had to learn to fight, to protect yourself and those who fight alongside you. The training you've had, and the direction of your growth, is determined by your class. If you wish to be a hard-bitten defender or a wielder of heavy weapons, choose the Warrior class. If you wish to dodge deftly through battle, delivering debilitating strikes, choose the Thief class. To wield powerful elemental magic and summon creatures to fight at your side, choose the Black Mage; if your magic is more about protecting your comrades and smiting evil with a holy weapon, choose the White Mage. The Charmer weaves together unique spell-songs and hexes with dance and sexual suggestion to bolster allies and exploit enemies' desires. Your class determines what you're able to do in combat through a combination of passive perks and active powers, which include things like magic spells and fighting styles. Every class grants you new perks and powers as you gain experience, but with time and practice you can master a huge array of powers from your own class and others. Your choice of class will not restrict what weapons and gear you use, or even what powers you learn, though certain classes will gain greater or lesser benefits from each due to their perks. Through training, it is possible to change your class during your adventures."

rows.original:
Primary Attribute: Toughness
Class Affinities: Toughness, Strength, Agility
Masters of armed combat, warriors live and die by their martial skill and the strength of their armor. As a warrior, you will be unparalleled at enduring enemy attacks and drawing their ire from your more vulnerable companions. A strong heart and raw toughness will see you through the dangers you face more than anything else, supported by your capacity to strike with great strength and agility when the going gets rough. The life of a warrior is one of triumph through violence.
rows.translation:
主要属性：坚韧
职业关联属性：坚韧、力量、敏捷
作为武装战斗的专家，战士们的生死完全取决于他们的武艺以及所穿戴的盔甲的强度。作为一名战士，你将在承受敌人攻击方面无人能及，同时也会因此招致那些防御较弱的同伴们的怨恨。 一颗坚强的心和无比的坚韧，将使你能够战胜所面临的一切危险；而当你遇到艰难险阻时，你强大的力量与敏捷的反应能力，也会成为你战胜困难的助力。战士的人生，就是在暴力中不断取得胜利的人生。
rows.raw: "Primary Attribute: Toughness\nClass Affinities: Toughness, Strength, Agility\nMasters of armed combat, warriors live and die by their martial skill and the strength of their armor. As a warrior, you will be unparalleled at enduring enemy attacks and drawing their ire from your more vulnerable companions. A strong heart and raw toughness will see you through the dangers you face more than anything else, supported by your capacity to strike with great strength and agility when the going gets rough. The life of a warrior is one of triumph through violence."

rows.original:
Primary Attribute: Agility
Class Affinities: Agility, Cunning, Strength
Adepts of shadow and subterfuge, thieves make their fortunes in the underbellies of distant cities and on the lonely trade roads with equal ease. As a thief, you're hard to pin down and hit, easily evading enemy attacks before slipping behind them for the kill. Agility is your greatest weapon — both for avoiding harm, and landing your own blows — however, having the cunning to pick out your enemies' weaknesses and the strength to exploit them are valuable assets indeed. The life of a thief is one of profit through swiftness and guile.
rows.translation:
主要属性：敏捷  
职业倾向：敏捷、狡猾、力量  
盗贼们擅长隐秘行动与诡计，他们既能在遥远城市的阴暗角落里谋生，也能在偏僻的交易道路上轻易获得财富。作为一名盗贼，你很难被抓住或击中，总能轻松避开敌人的攻击，然后从背后发动致命一击。 敏捷才是你最强大的武器——无论是用来躲避伤害，还是用来发动攻击；然而，能够敏锐地发现敌人的弱点并加以利用，这样的智慧与实力确实是非常宝贵的财富。对于一个小偷来说，快速行动与诡计多端才是获得利益的根本途径。
rows.raw: "Primary Attribute: Agility\nClass Affinities: Agility, Cunning, Strength\nAdepts of shadow and subterfuge, thieves make their fortunes in the underbellies of distant cities and on the lonely trade roads with equal ease. As a thief, you're hard to pin down and hit, easily evading enemy attacks before slipping behind them for the kill. Agility is your greatest weapon — both for avoiding harm, and landing your own blows — however, having the cunning to pick out your enemies' weaknesses and the strength to exploit them are valuable assets indeed. The life of a thief is one of profit through swiftness and guile."

rows.original:
Primary Attribute: Willpower
Class Affinities: Willpower, Toughness, Presence
Scholars of the occult who dedicate themselves to the healing and preservation of others, white mages study the magic granted to mortals by the gods long ago. As a white mage, you can use your magic to shield your allies from harm, heal their wounds, and to attune with nature for your defense. Maintaining the willpower to harness and control your magic is critical, but in the dangerous Frost Marches, you'll rely on your toughness and presence more and more to keep your party together. The life of a white mage is one of dedication to your comrades and those you deem worthy of your protection.
rows.translation:
主要属性：意志力  
职业倾向：意志力、坚韧、存在感  

这些致力于治愈他人、守护他人安全的神秘学者——白色法师们，研究着远古诸神赋予人类的魔法力量。 作为一名白魔法师，你可以运用魔法来保护你的盟友免受伤害，治愈他们的伤势，还可以与大自然融为一体以增强防御能力。保持足够的意志力来驾驭和控制魔法至关重要，但在危险的重霜之地，你将越来越依赖自己的坚韧与勇气来维持团队的团结。 白魔法师的生活，就是致力于保护自己的同伴以及那些你认为值得被守护的人。
rows.raw: "Primary Attribute: Willpower\nClass Affinities: Willpower, Toughness, Presence\nScholars of the occult who dedicate themselves to the healing and preservation of others, white mages study the magic granted to mortals by the gods long ago. As a white mage, you can use your magic to shield your allies from harm, heal their wounds, and to attune with nature for your defense. Maintaining the willpower to harness and control your magic is critical, but in the dangerous Frost Marches, you'll rely on your toughness and presence more and more to keep your party together. The life of a white mage is one of dedication to your comrades and those you deem worthy of your protection."

rows.original:
Primary Attribute: Willpower
Class Affinities: Willpower, Cunning, Presence
Scholars of the occult who delve into the twisted, and often forbidden, secrets left behind by the Wraiths that once plagued the world are referred to %"black mages" by more traditional sorcerers. As a black mage, you command tremendous magical power, able to blast your foes with magic, corrupt their minds, or even bind spirits to do your bidding. You must have great willpower to control such magics, though, and you'll need both cunning to resist the temptations and dangers of magic, and the presence to overbear and command dangerous spirits. The life of a black mage is one of power through knowledge and secrets.
rows.translation:
主要属性：意志力  
职业倾向：意志力、狡黠、存在感  

那些深入研究那些曾经困扰世界的幽灵们留下的扭曲而往往被禁止的秘密的神秘学者，被更为传统的巫师们称为“黑法师”。 作为一名黑魔法师，你拥有强大的魔法力量，能够用魔法攻击敌人、扰乱他们的思想，甚至驱使灵魂为你效力。然而，要掌控这样的力量，你必须具备坚定的意志力。同时，你还需要运用智慧来抵御魔法的诱惑与危险，还要有足够的勇气来压制和指挥那些危险的灵魂。 黑魔法师的生活，就是通过知识与秘密来获取力量。
rows.raw: 'Primary Attribute: Willpower\nClass Affinities: Willpower, Cunning, Presence\nScholars of the occult who delve into the twisted, and often forbidden, secrets left behind by the Wraiths that once plagued the world are referred to %"black mages" by more traditional sorcerers. As a black mage, you command tremendous magical power, able to blast your foes with magic, corrupt their minds, or even bind spirits to do your bidding. You must have great willpower to control such magics, though, and you\'ll need both cunning to resist the temptations and dangers of magic, and the presence to overbear and command dangerous spirits. The life of a black mage is one of power through knowledge and secrets.'

rows.original:
Primary Attribute: Presence
Class Affinities: Presence, Agility, Cunning
While the world is full of bards and performers, only some of these rare souls learn to blend magic and sensuality together into a unique performance that inspires lust and courage. As a charmer, you know how to bolster the courage and fighting spirit of your companions, and how to sap the wills of those who oppose you. Song, spell, and your sensual body are all means to your ends. Your presence — your innate and irresistible force of personality — is your greatest weapon, supplemented by the agility of a charmer and the cunning to both manipulate and resist the wiles of others. The life of a charmer is one of joy sought in the hearts of others.
rows.translation:
主要属性：存在感
职业倾向：存在感、敏捷、狡黠

虽然这个世界上到处都是吟游诗人和表演者，但只有少数这些人能够将魔法与感官魅力结合起来，创造出独一无二的表演，从而激发人们的欲望与勇气。 作为一名魅惑者，你懂得如何激发同伴们的勇气与斗志，也知道如何削弱那些与你为敌之人的意志。歌声、法术，以及你那诱人的身姿，都是你达成目标的工具。而你自身的存在——那种与生俱来、令人无法抗拒的个人魅力——才是你最强大的武器。再加上作为一名魅惑者所拥有的敏捷身手，以及操纵他人、抵御他人诡计的聪明才智，你就更加无所不能了。 魅惑者的生活，就是在他人心中寻找快乐。
rows.raw: "Primary Attribute: Presence\nClass Affinities: Presence, Agility, Cunning\nWhile the world is full of bards and performers, only some of these rare souls learn to blend magic and sensuality together into a unique performance that inspires lust and courage. As a charmer, you know how to bolster the courage and fighting spirit of your companions, and how to sap the wills of those who oppose you. Song, spell, and your sensual body are all means to your ends. Your presence — your innate and irresistible force of personality — is your greatest weapon, supplemented by the agility of a charmer and the cunning to both manipulate and resist the wiles of others. The life of a charmer is one of joy sought in the hearts of others."

rows.original:
With your history and upbringing known, there is the matter of your body and its appearance. Your physical sex will determine which sexual encounters are open to you. While some characters may have preferences, the majority of Savarrans accept partners regardless of what's between their legs; still, that equipment will of course decide which positions and situations you find yourself in.

    What is your biological sex?
    
    [var0
        |Elves of Savarra have a third natural sex, commonly called the half-sexed. Typically these elves have smaller, more slender frames and a mix of both a penis and breasts. They tend towards feminine appearance and personality, but there are gentleman half-sexes just as there are ladies.
    ]
rows.translation:
考虑到你的背景和成长经历，还有一个关于你的身体及其外貌的问题。你的生理性别将决定你能参与哪些类型的性行为。虽然有些角色可能会有特定的偏好，但大多数萨瓦兰人并不在意对方的生理性别；不过，这些生理特征当然也会影响你能尝试哪些性姿势和情境。

那么，你的生理性别是什么呢？
    
    [var0
        |萨瓦拉的精灵们存在第三种自然性别，通常被称为“半性精灵”。这类精灵通常体型较为纤细，同时拥有阴茎和乳房。他们往往具有女性化的外貌和性格特征，但同样也存在男性化的半性精灵。
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    With your history and upbringing known, there is the matter of your body and its appearance. Your physical sex will determine which sexual encounters are open to you. While some characters may have preferences, the majority of Savarrans accept partners regardless of what's between their legs; still, that equipment will of course decide which positions and situations you find yourself in.

    What is your biological sex?
    
    [var0
        |Elves of Savarra have a third natural sex, commonly called the half-sexed. Typically these elves have smaller, more slender frames and a mix of both a penis and breasts. They tend towards feminine appearance and personality, but there are gentleman half-sexes just as there are ladies.
    ]
    "

rows.original:
Your physical sex is one thing, but how masculine or feminine you look at a glance is another. 

    Adjust the slider between the extremes of Masculinity, Androgeny, and Femininity. This score may affect how some characters speak about you, or to you, but has no effect on gameplay.
rows.translation:
你的生理性别是一回事，但乍一看你显得有多男性化或多女性化，则是另一回事。

请调整“男性化”、“雄性特征”和“女性化”这三个选项之间的滑块。这个设置可能会影响某些角色对你说话的方式，或者你与这些角色交流时的互动方式，但并不会对游戏玩法产生任何影响。
rows.raw:
"
    Your physical sex is one thing, but how masculine or feminine you look at a glance is another. 

    Adjust the slider between the extremes of Masculinity, Androgeny, and Femininity. This score may affect how some characters speak about you, or to you, but has no effect on gameplay."

rows.original:
You are currently: [var0
        |Ruggedly Masculine
        |Boyish
        |Androgynous
        |Feminine
        |Beautifully Feminine
    ].
    
    By default, the game will refer to you as a: [var1|Man|Woman]. You may also choose your identity explicitly if you prefer. This selection may be changed at-will from the Appearance tab in the Journal.
rows.translation:
您当前位于： [var0
        |粗犷而充满男子气概
        |孩子气
        |中性特质
        |女性特质
        |极具女性魅力
    ]默认情况下，游戏会将您称为： [var1|伙计|女性]如果你愿意，也可以明确选择自己的身份。这个设置可以通过“日志”界面中的“外观”选项随时进行更改。
rows.raw:
"
    You are currently: [var0
        |Ruggedly Masculine
        |Boyish
        |Androgynous
        |Feminine
        |Beautifully Feminine
    ].
    
    By default, the game will refer to you as a: [var1|Man|Woman]. You may also choose your identity explicitly if you prefer. This selection may be changed at-will from the Appearance tab in the Journal.
    "

rows.original: Use the game's default gender logic. Low femininity characters will use masculine pronouns, and high feminity characters will use feminine pronouns. If your feminity changes during your adventure, your pronouns will match.
rows.translation: 请使用游戏默认的性别设定规则。女性化程度较低的角色会使用男性代词，而女性化程度较高的角色则会使用女性代词。如果在游戏过程中你的女性化程度发生了变化，你的代词也会相应地做出调整。
rows.raw: "Use the game's default gender logic. Low femininity characters will use masculine pronouns, and high feminity characters will use feminine pronouns. If your feminity changes during your adventure, your pronouns will match."

rows.original: Override the default gender logic to always use masculine pronouns.
rows.translation: 覆盖默认的性别设定，始终使用男性代词。
rows.raw: "Override the default gender logic to always use masculine pronouns."

rows.original: Override the default gender logic to always use feminine pronouns.
rows.translation: 覆盖默认的性别设定，始终使用女性代词。
rows.raw: "Override the default gender logic to always use feminine pronouns."

rows.original:
What color is your hair[var0| and fur], how long do you keep it, and in what style?

    Your hair grows over time during your adventures. There are multiple stylists in the world who can help trim, or even recolor and restyle, it.
rows.translation:
你的头发是什么颜色？[var0| 还有毛皮]你会留它多久，又会选择什么样的造型呢？

在冒险的过程中，你的头发会逐渐生长。世界上有很多发型师可以帮助你修剪头发，甚至还可以重新为你的头发选择颜色并设计新的造型。
rows.raw:
"
    What color is your hair[var0| and fur], how long do you keep it, and in what style?

    Your hair grows over time during your adventures. There are multiple stylists in the world who can help trim, or even recolor and restyle, it."

rows.original: In the catfolk homeland of Jassira, it is common custom for young cats to dye their hair a bright and vibrant color — with royal purple often reserved for the higher aristocracy.
rows.translation: 在猫人故乡贾西拉，年轻猫人们将头发染成鲜艳明亮的颜色是一种常见的习俗——而皇家紫色通常只被高等贵族所使用。
rows.raw: "\n        In the catfolk homeland of Jassira, it is common custom for young cats to dye their hair a bright and vibrant color — with royal purple often reserved for the higher aristocracy."

rows.translation: 复杂难懂的非洲风格发型
那你的眼睛是什么颜色的呢？

rows.original:
And your height? Are you a tall and imposing figure, standing imperious over those who have caught your ire — or are you svelte and compact, a coiled spring bursting with energy and ready to outmaneuver those lumbering giants?

    Height has no influence on combat, but can influence certain events.
rows.translation:
那么你的身高呢？你是那种高大威猛、令人生畏的人物，站在那些惹怒你的人面前显得格外强势——还是说你身材苗条、灵活敏捷，就像一根充满能量的弹簧，随时准备灵活地避开那些行动迟缓的“巨人”？

身高并不会影响战斗能力，但可能会对某些特定场景或事件产生影响。
rows.raw:
"
    And your height? Are you a tall and imposing figure, standing imperious over those who have caught your ire — or are you svelte and compact, a coiled spring bursting with energy and ready to outmaneuver those lumbering giants?

    Height has no influence on combat, but can influence certain events."

rows.original: Your height is just one facet of your build, alongside your physique: the combination of your muscle tone and body fat. Each is rated from 1 to 100, and combine to determine how toned or rotund you are. Your physique will be referenced often when your body's brought up in descriptions, but has no direct effect on gameplay.
rows.translation: 你的身高只是你体格特征的其中一个方面，还有你的肌肉线条与体脂比例同样重要。这些因素都会被评定为1到100分，综合这些评分才能确定你的体格是紧致还是丰满。在描述你的外貌时，这些体格特征会被经常提及，但它们并不会直接影响游戏玩法。
rows.raw: "\n    Your height is just one facet of your build, alongside your physique: the combination of your muscle tone and body fat. Each is rated from 1 to 100, and combine to determine how toned or rotund you are. Your physique will be referenced often when your body's brought up in descriptions, but has no direct effect on gameplay."

rows.original: How big are your assets? Your sizes, big or small, can unlock additional content. You will rarely if ever be turned away from a character entirely based on your size, but some may have preferences for particularly well endowed or cute and small partners and have bonus content to reflect it.
rows.translation: 如何 大的 这些就是你的“资产”吧？无论你的体型是大还是小，都能用来解锁额外的内容。几乎从来没有情况下，会因为你的体型而无法选择某个角色，不过有些角色可能会更偏爱那些身材特别好或者体型娇小可爱的伴侣，而相应的游戏内容也会为此做出相应的设计。
rows.raw: "\n How big are your assets? Your sizes, big or small, can unlock additional content. You will rarely if ever be turned away from a character entirely based on your size, but some may have preferences for particularly well endowed or cute and small partners and have bonus content to reflect it."

rows.original: And do you have any... special talents, when it comes to sex?
rows.translation: 那么，在性方面，你有没有什么……特别的特长呢？
rows.raw: "And do you have any... special talents, when it comes to sex?"

rows.original: You start with a larger penis, if you have one, and it's easier for transformations to increase your penis size.
rows.translation: 如果你有较大的阴茎，那么进行变形操作时增加阴茎尺寸会更容易些。
rows.raw: "You start with a larger penis, if you have one, and it's easier for transformations to increase your penis size."

rows.original: You start with larger breasts, if you have them, and your cupsize increases more rapidly with transformations.
rows.translation: 如果你有较大的胸部，那么在角色变换的过程中，你的罩杯尺寸会更快地增大。
rows.raw: "You start with larger breasts, if you have them, and your cupsize increases more rapidly with transformations."

rows.original: Your orifices can more easily accommodate large insertions and more quickly recover from stretching.
rows.translation: 你的这些器官能够更轻松地容纳较大的物体，也能更快地从拉伸状态中恢复过来。
rows.raw: "Your orifices can more easily accommodate large insertions and more quickly recover from stretching."

rows.original: Your orifices become gaped more easily by large insertions and stay gaped longer.
rows.translation: 较大的物体插入后，你的孔洞会更容易张开，并且张开的状态会持续更长时间。
rows.raw: "Your orifices become gaped more easily by large insertions and stay gaped longer."

rows.original: You start with higher fertility and virility, and your Pregnancy Speed is higher. All three stats increase more easily with transformations.
rows.translation: 你初始时就具备更高的生育能力和性能力，同时怀孕速度也会更快。这三项数值在通过变形变换后都会更容易得到提升。
rows.raw: "You start with higher fertility and virility, and your Pregnancy Speed is higher. All three stats increase more easily with transformations."

rows.original: You start with a fertility and virility of zero, and it increases more slowly as the result of transformations.
rows.translation: 你的初始状态是生育能力和活力均为零，而这些数值会在经历各种变化后逐渐缓慢增加。
rows.raw: "You start with a fertility and virility of zero, and it increases more slowly as the result of transformations."

rows.original: You start the game lactating if you have breasts. It's easier to start lactating, you lactate more, and it takes longer for lactation to wind down.
rows.translation: 如果你有乳房，开始游戏时就会进入哺乳状态。这样开始哺乳会更容易，产奶量也会更多，而且哺乳结束的时间也会更晚。
rows.raw: "You start the game lactating if you have breasts. It's easier to start lactating, you lactate more, and it takes longer for lactation to wind down."

rows.original: You've already gotten yourself plenty milky as a Wyld Elf.
rows.translation: 作为野精灵，你已经获得了足够的资源了。
rows.raw: "You've already gotten yourself plenty milky as a Wyld Elf."

rows.original: You start with a higher Libido, and it increases more rapidly over time.
rows.translation: 你的初始欲望值较高，并且会随着时间的推移而更快地增加。
rows.raw: "You start with a higher Libido, and it increases more rapidly over time."

rows.original: You start with a lower Libido, and your lust gains over time are slower.
rows.translation: 你的初始欲望值较低，因此随着时间的推移，你的欲望增长速度也会变慢。
rows.raw: "You start with a lower Libido, and your lust gains over time are slower."

rows.original: Your orgasms produce a greater volume of ejaculate if you have a penis, and vaginal orgasms are more likely to end in squirting.
rows.translation: 如果你有阴茎，性高潮时射出的精液量会更多；而阴道性高潮则更有可能伴随着精液喷射的现象。
rows.raw: "Your orgasms produce a greater volume of ejaculate if you have a penis, and vaginal orgasms are more likely to end in squirting."

rows.original: Finally, by what name will you be known on your adventures?
rows.translation: 最后，在你的冒险旅程中，你会以什么名字被人所知呢？
rows.raw: "\n    Finally, by what name will you be known on your adventures?"

rows.original: d like to use this name?
\nThe name "[pc.name]" is shared with a character in the game, are you sure you'd like to use this name?
rows.translation: 这个名字[pc.name]这个名称将会与游戏中的某个角色共享，你确定要使用这个名称吗？
rows.raw: '\n \\nThe name "[pc.name]" is shared with a character in the game, are you sure you\'d like to use this name?'

rows.original: Name must be 1-16 characters long and may not contain any special characters.
rows.translation: 名称必须由1到16个字符组成，且不能包含任何特殊字符。
rows.raw: "\nName must be 1-16 characters long and may not contain any special characters."

rows.original: Are you sure you want to restart from the beginning?
rows.translation: 你确定要从头开始重新开始吗？
rows.raw: "\n        Are you sure you want to restart from the beginning?"

rows.original:
What difficulty would you like to play on?

    Story difficulty is ideal for one-handed play, while Dark difficulty provides a much more ample challenge for veterans of the genre.
    
    The difficulty can later be changed at any time from the Menu.
rows.translation:
您想选择哪种难度来进行游戏呢？

故事难度非常适合单手操作，而黑暗难度则为该类型游戏的资深玩家提供了更具挑战性的体验。

之后您可以在菜单中随时更改难度设置。
rows.raw:
"
    What difficulty would you like to play on?

    Story difficulty is ideal for one-handed play, while Dark difficulty provides a much more ample challenge for veterans of the genre.
    
    The difficulty can later be changed at any time from the Menu."

rows.original: For players that just want to experience CoC2's story. Reduces enemy damage by 60% and increases your party's damage by 60%.
rows.translation: 对于那些只想体验《CoC2》故事线的玩家来说，这个选项可以将敌人造成的伤害减少60%，同时使你的队伍造成的伤害增加60%。
rows.raw: "For players that just want to experience CoC2's story. Reduces enemy damage by 60% and increases your party's damage by 60%."

rows.original: For players who want to enjoy the game but not worry about losing. Reduces enemy damage by 25% and increases your party's damage by 25%.
rows.translation: 对于那些想要享受游戏乐趣却又担心会输的玩家来说，这个功能可以有效地降低敌人造成的伤害25%，同时增加你所在团队的攻击力25%。
rows.raw: "For players who want to enjoy the game but not worry about losing. Reduces enemy damage by 25% and increases your party's damage by 25%."

rows.original: The game's default difficulty. You'll need a party of companions and some strategy to win. But defeat isn't always the end...
rows.translation: 这是游戏的默认难度。你需要一组同伴，并运用一些策略才能获胜。不过，失败并不总是意味着终结……
rows.raw: "The game's default difficulty. You'll need a party of companions and some strategy to win. But defeat isn't always the end..."

rows.original: The world of Savarra is grim and perilous indeed. Enemy damage is increased by 20%, and the party's damage is reduced by 15%.
rows.translation: 萨瓦拉的世界确实充满了残酷与危险。敌人的攻击伤害会增加20%，而玩家队伍造成的伤害则会减少15%。
rows.raw: "The world of Savarra is grim and perilous indeed. Enemy damage is increased by 20%, and the party's damage is reduced by 15%."
